A-1782 entity-SME base: 20-row visualization

Branch feat/a-1782-entity-sme-preprocessing@86fdb2d8. Dataset: twelvelabs/tl_entity_sme_tdf. The assembled default_sft_entity_sme + sft_sme base pipeline ran with deterministic exact sampling of 20 rows. Only token-count bookkeeping was skipped because it requires the production remote SQLite cache; skipped stage: preprocessing.base.stages.common.count_tokens:run.

How to read this: every source row becomes exactly one output row. The entity renderer chooses one structure/mode/representation combination. Paraphrasing and segment instructions use mode=replace, so they edit selected rows rather than adding copies. Red cards expose the roster-reference contradiction discussed in PR #1689.
final rows 20added rows 0flat / consolidated 9 / 11ASR / audio 8 / 12string / object 3 / 17paraphrased 14segment instructions 7P1 affected 4

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/6ed470f5/6ed470f5_chunk5.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 53847,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Review the entire video and segment it into distinct shots. Then, for each identified shot, provide a detailed description of what occurs in that shot, explicitly incorporating and referencing the people-related information supplied in the details below. Ensure that no segment has a duration shorter than 0 seconds.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "every person in this segment, however minor. Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a short description of how they look.",
            "items_type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Jason Cole (Transit Supervisor and Father)
- Lynn (Health inspector and Jason's ex-wife)
- Dr. Darnoff (Radiation specialist)
- Colonel Jenkins (Military commander)
- Rachel Cole (Health Department Supervisor)
- Sydney Cole (Jason's daughter)
- Emily (Sydney's friend)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 0.1,
    "summary": "@p1 and @p5 emerge from a set of heavy metal gates into a narrow, dark alleyway. The walls are covered in graffiti, and trash is strewn across the ground. They are both out of breath and lean against the gate for a moment, looking around to get their bearings. The scene is lit by a single, flickering streetlight. They quickly turn and begin running down the alley toward the street.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Lynn"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 0.1,
    "end_time": 29.512,
    "summary": "The couple reaches the end of the alley and looks toward the apartment building. Across the street, four @p20 soldiers are standing guard at the main entrance, which is cordoned off with yellow [QUARANTINE] tape. A large military vehicle is parked nearby. @p1 and @p5 stay hidden behind a black car, watching the soldiers for a moment before moving away to find another entrance.",
    "person": [
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms",
      "Jason Cole",
      "Lynn"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 29.512,
    "end_time": 73.99,
    "summary": "Inside a mobile laboratory enclosed in clear plastic sheeting, @p7 is working at a microscope while @p17 stands nearby, talking on a radio headset. @p17 hangs up and approaches @p7, and they begin a serious conversation. A computer monitor on a rolling cart shows a grainy video feed of a large spider. @p7 points to the screen as he speaks, his expression grave.",
    "person": [
      "Dr. Darnoff",
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 73.99,
    "end_time": 92.008,
    "summary": "@p7 sits down at the computer and begins typing, pulling up several different camera feeds on the screen. The footage shows various parts of the spider nest, with hundreds of creatures moving around. One feed shows a close-up of a spider's head, its multiple eyes reflecting the light. @p7 watches the screens intensely, his face illuminated by the blue light of the monitor.",
    "person": [
      "Dr. Darnoff"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 92.008,
    "end_time": 118.034,
    "summary": "@p1 and @p5 continue to run through a series of narrow, deserted alleyways. The area is filled with old brick buildings and industrial equipment. They move quickly, holding hands as they navigate through the maze of backstreets. The sound of their footsteps echoes against the tall walls. They pause at a corner, looking both ways before crossing a wider street toward another alley.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Lynn"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 118.034,
    "end_time": 149.732,
    "summary": "As they run past a pile of wooden debris and trash, a huge spider suddenly lunges out from the shadows, its long legs reaching for them. They both scream and scramble to the side as the creature crashes into a nearby wall. A high-angle shot shows them running away as the spider quickly turns and follows. They dodge around obstacles as the creature stays close behind, its body making a skittering sound on the pavement.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 149.732,
    "end_time": 185.734,
    "summary": "@p1 and @p5 reach a metal fire escape ladder and begin frantically climbing. The giant spider follows them, its legs easily gripping the brick wall. As @p1 reaches a window, the spider fires a thick stream of webbing that wraps around his legs, pulling him back toward the edge. @p5 grabs @p1's arms and pulls with all her might, screaming as she tries to drag him inside. After a desperate struggle, @p1 manages to kick free from the webbing and they both tumble into the room.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Lynn"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 185.734,
    "end_time": 194.677,
    "summary": "Inside the room, which is filled with old wooden crates, @p1 and @p5 collapse on the floor, gasping for air. The camera moves in close on their faces as they look at each other, their expressions a mix of relief and exhaustion. @p5 reaches out and touches @p1's face, her eyes filled with tears. They stay on the floor for a few moments, huddled together, before @p1 slowly begins to stand up.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Lynn"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 194.653,
    "end_time": 195.987,
    "summary": "A high-angle, exterior shot shows a giant, black spider with long, spindly legs emerging from a window of a brick building. The creature's movements are quick and unsettling as it scrambles down the side of the building, its sharp claws gripping the rough brick surface. The camera remains stationary, capturing the spider's full body as it descends, its many eyes glowing with a faint, reddish light.",

  },
  {
    "start_time": 195.987,
    "end_time": 199.791,
    "summary": "Inside a dimly lit warehouse, @p1 and @p19 are seen navigating through a maze of tall, wooden crates. @p1 leads the way, his expression tense as he scans the shadows for any sign of danger. @p19 follows closely behind, her breathing heavy as she tries to keep up. The camera follows them at a low angle, emphasizing the overwhelming scale of the warehouse and the sense of claustrophobia created by the narrow aisles.",
    "person": [

      "Rachel Cole"

  },

They move with frantic energy, their footfalls echoing in the cavernous space as they head toward a distant set of stairs.",

    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 422.08,
    "end_time": 430.389,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to a close-up of @p19's face as she listens intently to the sounds of the building. Her eyes are wide with apprehension, her breathing shallow as she tries to remain silent. Beside her, @p1's face is set in a determined line, his gaze fixed on the hallway ahead. He holds his gun firmly, his movements disciplined and purposeful. They both seem alert and ready for any potential threat, their senses heightened by the ongoing crisis.",
    "person": [
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Jason Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 430.389,
    "end_time": 437.796,
    "summary": "Suddenly, a giant spider emerges from a nearby doorway, its many eyes glowing in the dim light. Its legs scramble over the walls and floor as it let out a chilling, high-pitched screech. @p1 and @p19 freeze for a moment, their eyes fixed on the creature. @p1 quickly raises his gun and fires a series of shots, the bright flashes illuminating the hallway. The spider screeches in pain and rage, its movements becoming frantic as it tries to escape or attack.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 437.796,
    "end_time": 447.005,
    "summary": "A series of quick shots shows @p1 and @p19 engaging in a desperate struggle with the spider. They dodge around its long legs and use their weapons to keep it at bay. The creature's screeching continues to fill the hallway, its presence a constant threat. The camera captures the physical choreography of the battle, emphasizing the speed and agility of both the humans and the creature. @p1 and @p19 continue their assault, their expressions filled with a mix of terror and determination.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 447.005,
    "end_time": 455.314,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to an overhead shot as @p1 and @p19 finally manage to overpower the spider. They pin it against the wall, their weapons held firmly against its body. The creature's movements slow and then stop as it succumbs to its injuries. The hallway falls into a sudden, eerie silence, broken only by the sound of @p1 and @p19's heavy breathing. They look at the dead spider, their expressions a mix of relief and exhaustion as they catch their breath.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 455.314,
    "end_time": 463.622,
    "summary": "Inside the apartment building hallway, @p1 and @p19 discuss their next move, their voices hushed as they try to avoid detection. @p1 outlines his plan to reach their apartment, grab their daughter @p11, and make a run for it. @p19 listens intently, her expression a mix of fear and determination as she realizes the magnitude of the task ahead. They know they must be quick and silent if they are to succeed, as the soldiers and the spiders are everywhere. @p1 takes a deep breath and gestures for @p19 to follow him, their resolve strengthened as they move closer to their goal.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Sydney Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 463.622,
    "end_time": 471.23,
    "summary": "A high-angle shot shows @p1 and @p19 walking cautiously down the hallway, their movements quick and disciplined. They check each door as they pass, their eyes scanning the shadows for any sign of intruders. The hallway is quiet, the only sound the faint click of their gear and the low hum of the building's ventilation system. They reach the end of the hall and pause, their eyes scanning the area for any sign of movement. @p1 gestures for @p19 to stay close, his expression grim as he scans the area.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 471.23,
    "end_time": 480.038,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to a close-up of @p1's face as he looks at @p19. His expression is one of intense focus and resolve, his jaw set in a determined line. The lighting in the hallway is dim, with only a few overhead lights casting long shadows across their faces. They both seem ready for any potential threat, their senses heightened by the ongoing crisis.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 480.038,
    "end_time": 488.847,
    "summary": "Inside the apartment building hallway, @p1 and @p19 continue to move cautiously toward their apartment. The camera follows them from behind, emphasizing their vulnerability and the sense of uncertainty that now surrounds them. They reach a landing and pause for a moment, their chests heaving as they catch their breath. @p1 looks around the corner, his gaze searching for any sign of danger.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 488.847,
    "end_time": 497.856,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to a close-up of @p19's face as she leans against the wall, her breathing ragged. Her expression is one of pure terror, her eyes wide as she listens to the sounds of the building. She looks at @p1, her gaze filled with a desperate plea for safety. The lighting in the landing is low, with only a faint glow coming from a small window high on the wall. They stay there for a few moments, the only sound the distant hum of the building's ventilation system.",
    "person": [
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Jason Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 497.856,
    "end_time": 507.266,
    "summary": "Inside the military's mobile command unit, @p17 and @p7 are engaged in a heated argument about the current operation. @p17 is frustrated by the slow progress and the increasing danger to his men, while @p7 insists on following his scientific protocols. The tension between them is palpable, their voices rising as they clash over the best course of action. Outside, the sounds of machinery and the distant screeches of spiders provide a chilling backdrop to their disagreement.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "Dr. Darnoff"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 507.266,
    "end_time": 516.675,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to a wide shot of the mobile command unit, showing the various computer terminals and monitoring equipment. @p25 is seen working at one of the terminals, his expression grim as he watches the surveillance feed. The screens show various parts of the city, many of which are now covered in thick, white webbing. Some of the cameras are being obscured by the spiders, making it difficult for the researchers to get a clear picture of what is happening. @p7 points out a particularly large spider nest, his voice filled with a sense of dread as he realizes the scale of the infestation.",
    "person": [
      "the young man in a white lab coat and blue gloves",
      "Dr. Darnoff"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 516.675,
    "end_time": 526.084,
    "summary": "A close-up shot focuses on @p17's face as he looks at @p7. His expression is one of intense frustration and anger, his brow furrowed as he listens to the scientist's explanations. The lighting in the mobile unit is harsh and clinical, emphasizing the sense of urgency and the high stakes involved in their mission. They continue to argue, their voices rising in volume as they reach a stalemate.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "Dr. Darnoff"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 526.084,
    "end_time": 535.093,
    "summary": "The camera cuts back to the surveillance screens, showing the giant queen spider as she moves through the city streets. They know they must act quickly if they are to have any hope of defeating the creature.",
    "person": [
      "Dr. Darnoff",
      "the young man in a white lab coat and blue gloves"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 535.093,

    "summary": "Inside the mobile command unit, @p17 finally turns back to @p7, his expression grim and determined. The mobile unit is filled with the sound of activity and the low hum of communication devices.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "Dr. Darnoff",
      "the young man in a white lab coat and blue gloves"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 544.503,
    "end_time": 553.912,
    "summary": "An exterior shot shows the mobile command unit being lifted into the air by a heavy-duty military helicopter. The camera pans across the city, revealing the scale of the infestation and the gravity of the situation. The helicopter and its precious cargo continue to ascend, their hearts heavy with the memories of the horrors they have just faced.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 553.912,
    "end_time": 562.821,
    "summary": "A squad of @p20 soldiers moves cautiously through an apartment building hallway, their flashlights cutting through the darkness.       "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms",
      "Jason Cole",

    "summary": "A wide shot shows @p1 and @p19 walking cautiously down the hallway, their movements quick and disciplined.       "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 590.048,
    "end_time": 598.857,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to an overhead shot of the apartment hallway, which is now empty and quiet. The lighting is low, with only a few overhead lights casting long, erratic shadows across the walls. The scene is one of utter stillness and uncertainty as the battle for survival continues.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 598.857,
    "end_time": 608.066,
    "summary": "In a dimly lit hallway, @p1 surprises an @p20 guard and quickly overpowers him, pinning him to the ground.     "start_time": 798.423,
    "end_time": 802.927,
    "summary": "A wide, low-angle shot in a desolated street at night shows @p20 soldiers in camouflage gear and gas masks. One soldier in the foreground stands by a Humvee, holding an assault rifle. Other soldiers are positioned further down the street, one standing near a streetlight. Scattered leaves and debris litter the dark pavement. The atmosphere is grim and militaristic.",
    "person": [
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 802.927,
    "end_time": 807.932,
    "summary": "The camera pans to the left, revealing more of the military presence. A second Humvee is parked near a storefront with a sign that reads [Musical]. Soldiers in full gear continue to patrol the area. Another soldier walks across the street toward the vehicles. The street is dimly lit by building lights and distant streetlamps.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 807.932,
    "end_time": 815.682,
    "summary": "A medium shot through the window of a Humvee shows @p17, wearing a camouflage uniform and a matching cap, approaching the vehicle. He is holding a digital tablet or clipboard and looks sternly toward the camera. In the background, @p19 and @p1 are visible inside the vehicle, looking out with expressions of apprehension. Another soldier in a gas mask stands guard in the background on the left.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Jason Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 815.682,
    "end_time": 819.185,
    "summary": "A medium-wide shot shows @p17 from behind as he turns away from the Humvee. He is walking toward other soldiers who are standing in the middle of the dark street. On the right, @p1 and @p19 can still be seen through the Humvee window. The street is flanked by old brick buildings, and the ground is covered with fallen leaves. @p17's name tag [JENKINS] is visible on his uniform as he turns.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 819.185,
    "end_time": 824.44,
    "summary": "A tight medium shot from inside the dark vehicle shows @p19 and @p1 leaning together, looking out. @p19 has a worried, wide-eyed expression, her hand near her mouth. @p1, with his arm around her, looks equally concerned. The light from outside casts a soft glow on their faces, contrasting with the dark interior. They seem to be watching something unfolding in the street.",
    "person": [
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Jason Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 824.44,
    "end_time": 832.947,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 walking down the center of the street, flanked by @p20 soldiers in gas masks. They are moving with purpose, their rifles held at the ready. A Humvee with a mounted heavy weapon follows slowly behind them. The street is littered with trash and fallen leaves under the dim night lights. The group moves away from the camera into the dark.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 832.947,
    "end_time": 835.7,
    "summary": "A wide, high-angle shot shows a dark, narrow city street at night. A lone car is parked on the left side near a building with a sign that says [Auto Shop]. The street appears deserted and eerie, with shadows stretching across the pavement. The brick buildings on both sides rise several stories, some with lit windows.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 835.7,
    "end_time": 844.959,
    "summary": "Back inside the vehicle, a medium shot shows @p19 and @p1. @p19 is breathing heavily, looking panicked as she clings to @p1. @p1 holds her close, whispering to her with a comforting but tense expression. He glances toward the window, then back to @p19, trying to keep her calm. The lighting remains dark, focused on their emotional distress.",
    "person": [
      "Rachel Cole",
      "Jason Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 844.959,
    "end_time": 849.213,
    "summary": "A wide, high-angle shot shows @p20 soldiers in the street, their weapons pointed toward something in the distance. In the far background, a small, dark, multi-legged creature is seen skittering across the pavement. The soldiers stand in a defensive formation. @p17 is visible among them, also looking toward the threat. The street is otherwise dark and empty.",
    "person": [
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms",
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 849.213,
    "end_time": 853.48,
    "summary": "A medium shot of @p17 shows him drawing his pistol and pointing it forward with a grim, determined look. He is surrounded by @p20 soldiers who are also aiming their rifles. The camera then cuts to a wide shot of the street, where a large, black, spider-like creature is skittering toward the soldiers. Its movements are fast and erratic as it navigates past parked cars.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins",
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 853.48,
    "end_time": 860.975,
    "summary": "A sequence of quick cuts shows the chaos of the battle. One soldier is seen manning a heavy gatling gun on the back of a Humvee, firing rapidly. Inside their vehicle, @p1 and @p19 look out in horror, their faces illuminated by the flashes of gunfire. In the street, several more spiders appear, crawling over cars and toward the soldiers. The soldiers are seen firing their rifles at the approaching creatures.",
    "person": [
      "Jason Cole",
      "Rachel Cole"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 860.975,
    "end_time": 867.482,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 firing his pistol repeatedly, his face set in a mask of concentration and fear. The camera cuts back to the street, where several spiders are now among the soldiers, jumping and attacking. Smoke and dust fill the air from the gunfire. One spider is seen leaping onto a soldier, while others continue their relentless advance toward the group.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 867.482,
    "end_time": 876.24,
    "summary": "A wide shot shows the intense firefight in the street. Soldiers are scattered, some firing their weapons while others are being overwhelmed by the spider swarm. The creatures are seen leaping from rooftops and around parked cars. Muzzle flashes light up the dark street as the battle rages on. Several soldiers are seen being dragged away or knocked down by the fast-moving creatures.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 876.24,
    "end_time": 884.999,
    "summary": "A series of medium shots show the casualties of the battle. @p17 is knocked to the ground as a spider lunges at him. Other soldiers are seen struggling with the creatures in the background. A soldier in the foreground fires his rifle into the air as a spider attacks him from above. The street is a scene of utter chaos and violence, with smoke and flashes of light everywhere.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 884.999,
    "end_time": 891.756,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 on the ground, his face smeared with dirt as he continues to fire his pistol at an off-screen spider. He looks around frantically, his expression one of desperation. In the background, a spider is seen attacking another soldier near a Humvee. @p17 then crawls toward the Humvee, trying to reach a more defensible position as the creatures close in.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 891.756,
    "end_time": 898.513,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 climbing onto the back of the Humvee. He is breathing heavily and looks terrified as he reaches for a radio or communication device. In the foreground, the heavy gatling gun is visible. He shouts into the radio while still holding his pistol in his other hand. In the background, the street is filled with the sounds of battle and the screeching of the spiders.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 898.513,
    "end_time": 905.251,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 kneeling on the Humvee, still firing his pistol into the dark street. He looks exhausted and desperate as he continues his radio call. The camera then cuts to him taking control of the gatling gun, gripping the handles and preparing to fire. His face is illuminated by the lights of the vehicle and the distant streetlamps as he focuses on the approaching swarm.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 905.251,
    "end_time": 911.758,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 firing the heavy gatling gun. The weapon emits bright flashes and a continuous stream of fire as it rotates rapidly. He grit his teeth and leans into the weapon, his expression one of grim determination. The camera cuts to a low-angle shot of the street, where the bullets are seen shredding several spiders as they try to advance.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 911.758,
    "end_time": 917.764,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 still firing the gatling gun, smoke billowing from the weapon's barrels. He looks up suddenly as a spider leaps onto the Humvee near him. He quickly ducks and tries to fend off the creature with his hands. The camera then cuts to a wide shot of the Humvee, where the large spider is seen clawing at @p17 as he falls off the vehicle.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 917.764,
    "end_time": 928.274,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p17 on the ground, looking up in terror as a large spider stands over him, its multiple legs poised to strike. He tries to crawl away, his face contorted in fear. In the background, other spiders are seen moving through the street. The camera cuts to another soldier who is being attacked by a spider nearby. The battle appears to be reaching its bloody conclusion.",
    "person": [
      "Colonel Jenkins"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 928.274,
    "end_time": 928.762,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p20 soldiers in gas masks retreating down the street, their weapons still aimed toward the approaching spiders. One soldier is seen being tackled by a creature in the background. The camera then cuts to a low-angle shot of a spider crawling over the front of a Humvee, its screeching face illuminated by the vehicle's headlights. Several dead soldiers lie on the pavement around the vehicle.",
    "person": [
      "the group of military personnel in gray and black camouflage uniforms"
    ]
  }
]

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below.

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor. Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a short description of how they look.",
                "items_type": "string"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Review the entire video and segment it into distinct shots. Then, for each identified shot, provide a detailed description of what occurs in that shot, explicitly incorporating and referencing the people-related information supplied in the details below. Ensure that no segment has a duration shorter than 0 seconds.
```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor. Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a short description of how they look.",
                "items_type": "string"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/51859423/51859423_chunk1.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 110503,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Detect every major shot change and create a single segment for each shot, referencing the people listed below.\n\nPeople in this video:\n- Donald Trump: 2016 Presidential Candidate. the old blond hair man\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "only the lead/principal people in this segment",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Donald Trump (2016 Presidential Candidate)
- Melania Trump (Wife of Donald Trump)
- Ivanka Trump (Daughter of Donald Trump)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 4.95,
    "summary": "A medium shot captures @p1 at the podium, dressed in a sharp dark blue suit, a crisp white shirt, and a vibrant red tie. Behind him, several large American flags hang against a deep blue curtain backdrop. @p1 is mid-speech, gesturing emphatically with his hands to underscore his points. A small United States flag pin is visible on his left lapel. In the lower-right corner, a semi-transparent graphic for [C-SPAN c-span.org] is displayed.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 4.95,
    "end_time": 16.7,
    "summary": "The camera shifts to a wide shot of the enthusiastic crowd gathered in the lobby. People are seen cheering, clapping, and chanting with excitement. Many attendees are holding up rectangular blue signs with bold white lettering that reads [TRUMP Make America Great Again!]. The room is brightly lit, reflecting off the polished surfaces of the surrounding architecture. Some individuals in the audience are capturing the moment on their smartphones.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 16.7,
    "end_time": 75.85,
    "summary": "Returning to a medium shot, @p1 continues his address from behind the podium. He uses a variety of hand gestures, including pointing and opening his palms wide, as he speaks with conviction. The podium features a prominent sign with the text [TRUMP www.DonaldJTrump.com MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!]. The lighting is focused on @p1, making him the central figure against the patriotic background of flags. He occasionally glances down at notes placed on the lectern.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 75.85,
    "end_time": 86.7,
    "summary": "The camera briefly cuts back to the audience, showing a diverse group of supporters. People are smiling and nodding in agreement with the speaker's words. A man in the foreground wearing a red shirt is seen clapping vigorously. More campaign signs are visible throughout the crowd, creating a sea of blue and white. The atmosphere appears high-energy and celebratory as the event continues.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 86.7,
    "end_time": 185.2,
    "summary": "@p1 is shown in a medium shot, leaning slightly forward toward the microphones on the podium. He continues his critique, his facial expressions alternating between serious resolve and a slight smile as he interacts with the crowd's reactions. His blond hair is perfectly styled under the bright studio-style lighting. The [C-SPAN] logo remains visible in the corner. He gestures with his right hand, emphasizing a particular point by tapping the air.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 185.2,
    "end_time": 191.95,
    "summary": "A closer shot focuses on @p1 as he pauses briefly to look down at his prepared remarks. The detail of his dark blue suit and the texture of his red tie are more apparent. He looks back up at the audience, his blue eyes scanning the room. The background of American flags provides a consistent patriotic theme. The top of the podium, where the microphones are mounted, is also visible in this frame.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 191.95,
    "end_time": 254.2,
    "summary": "In a medium shot, @p1 raises his right hand with his index finger pointed upward to command attention. He is speaking about the need for strong leadership, his voice presumably carrying across the large hall. The blue and red colors of the flags behind him contrast with the dark suit. He moves his hands in rhythmic motions that mirror the cadence of his speech. The text on the front of the podium remains a focal point in the lower half of the shot.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 254.2,
    "end_time": 274.7,
    "summary": "The camera pans across the audience again, capturing their vocal support. Supporters are seen waving their signs in the air, creating a dynamic visual of blue and white. Some people are standing on chairs or steps to get a better view of @p1. The mix of casual and professional attire among the attendees suggests a broad range of supporters. The [C-SPAN] logo is still visible, indicating the live broadcast nature of the footage.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 274.7,
    "end_time": 398.8,
    "summary": "@p1 is back in the medium shot, spreading his arms wide in an expansive gesture. He appears to be building up to a major point in his address, his posture open and confident. The American flags behind him are slightly ruffled, possibly from an air conditioning system. He continues to speak with a direct gaze into the audience and occasionally toward the cameras. The sign on the podium [TRUMP www.DonaldJTrump.com MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!] is fully visible.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 398.8,
    "end_time": 415.7,
    "summary": "As @p1 reaches the pinnacle of his speech, he leans into the microphones and delivers his official announcement. He finishes the sentence and then raises a clenched fist in a triumphant gesture. The crowd's reaction is immediate and overwhelming, with many people jumping to their feet. @p1 stands tall at the podium, a satisfied expression on his face as he looks out over the cheering room. The flags and the podium branding serve as a powerful backdrop for this historic moment.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 415.7,
    "end_time": 429.2,
    "summary": "In a wide shot, @p1 is joined on stage by @p2 and @p3, who stand just behind and to his side. Both women are dressed in elegant white dresses and are smiling broadly as they clap along with the audience. @p1 also begins to clap, acknowledging the crowd's energy. Confetti or bright lights may be reflecting in the air, adding to the festive atmosphere. The music continues to play as the group enjoys the moment of celebration.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump",
      "Melania Trump",
      "Ivanka Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 429.2,
    "end_time": 517.95,

He points directly toward the audience, his expression determined as he discusses his economic plans. He uses sharp, precise hand movements to emphasize his words about reclaiming jobs. The podium text [TRUMP www.DonaldJTrump.com MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!] remains prominently displayed. The patriotic background continues to frame @p1 as he lays out his vision for the country's future.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 517.95,
    "end_time": 540.7,

He looks down at his notes one last time before looking back up with a serious expression. The lighting remains bright and focused, highlighting his features.     "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 540.367,
    "end_time": 554.714,
    "summary": "@p1 stands at the center of the frame behind a blue podium with a dark blue suit, white shirt, and red tie. He is in a medium shot, speaking into a pair of microphones, with several American flags visible in the background against a blue curtain. His expression is serious as he uses his hands to make broad gestures, emphasizing his words. The podium has white and red text that reads [TRUMP www.DonaldJTrump.com MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!]. A blue and white [C-SPAN] logo with [c-span.org] underneath is positioned in the lower right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 554.714,

He raises his right hand with his fingers curled together to punctuate a specific point about negotiations. The lighting is bright and even, casting soft shadows on his face and the flags behind him. He leans slightly forward towards the microphones as he speaks, his gaze fixed on the audience. The [C-SPAN] logo remains visible in the lower right throughout the shot.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 577.087,
    "end_time": 584.703,
    "summary": "The shot cuts to a different angle of @p1, still in a medium framing, showing him nodding slightly as he pauses between sentences. He looks down briefly at his notes on the podium before looking back up at the crowd with a resolute gaze. Behind him, the American flags are neatly draped, and the blue curtain provides a solid, professional backdrop. The text on the podium is clearly legible, and the [C-SPAN] logo is still in the corner. His hands rest briefly on the edges of the podium before he begins gesturing again.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 584.703,
    "end_time": 607.475,
    "summary": "Continuing in a medium shot, @p1 raises both hands, palms facing the audience, to emphasize a statement about the current state of trade. His mouth is open as he speaks forcefully, and his eyebrows are furrowed in a serious expression. The camera angle is slightly low, making him appear more prominent against the flags and curtain. The white and red [TRUMP] logo on the podium stands out against the dark blue background. The [C-SPAN] watermark is constant in the lower right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 607.475,
    "end_time": 610.367,
    "summary": "@p1 is shown in a medium shot, using a variety of hand gestures to illustrate his points, including pointing his finger and holding his hands apart as if measuring something. He appears very engaged with his speech, his eyes moving across the room to different sections of the audience. The lighting highlights his blond hair and the texture of his dark blue suit. The American flags behind him are slightly out of focus, keeping the viewer's attention on @p1 and the microphones. The [C-SPAN] logo and the podium text [MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!] are clearly visible.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  }

}

Row metadata and decisions

{
  "domain": "movie",
  "source_dataset": "tl_dense_caption_v1_1",
  "media_path": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/ec81eeb3/ec81eeb3_chunk1.mp4",
  "chunk_start": 1449.408,
  "chunk_end": 2033.659,
  "entity_sme_render": {
    "output_structure": "consolidated",
    "mode": "asr",
    "asr_source": "gemini",
    "representation": "object",
    "naming_fallback": "described",
    "entity_count": "all",
    "roster_tier": "all",
    "summary": true,

  },
  "segment_instruction_rule": null,

}

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/ec81eeb3/ec81eeb3_chunk1.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 153600,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 211
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Treat the entire video as a single, unified segment, then generate one consolidated analysis. In that analysis, include (1) a complete roster of all people who appear, and (2) a detailed, per-shot breakdown that specifies the relevant information shot by shot.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — all people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Nannie Jeter (Nanny/Housekeeper)
- Prof. Charles J. Ogletree (Harvard University Professor)
- Anthony Johnson (Inmate / Defendant)
- Marselis Parsons (News Anchor)
- John Pacht (Anthony's Lawyer)
- Susan Randall (Private Investigator)
- Shanequa Benitez (Resident of Yonkers)
- Dennis Whidbee (Anthony's Father)
- Kecia Johnson (Anthony's Mother)
- Alicia Alcindor (Anthony's Girlfriend)
- Rudy Giuliani (Former Mayor of NYC)
- Jonathan Kaufman (The Wall Street Journal)
- Eugene Jarecki (Narrator)
- David Simon (Creator of "The Wire")

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Consider the whole video as one segment and produce one consolidated analysis: the roster of people and the per-shot detail.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — all people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Treat the entire video as a single, unified segment, then generate one consolidated analysis. In that analysis, include (1) a complete roster of all people who appear, and (2) a detailed, per-shot breakdown that specifies the relevant information shot by shot.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — all people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

          {
            "name": "description",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "Caption the shot — people and their look/expression, the action, the setting, camera angle and motion, and exact on-screen text [in brackets]."
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the main characters in this segment",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Danny Anson (Twitter Contributor)
- Thomas (Caller)
- Joe (Caller)
- Terry (Caller)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 22.39,
    "summary": "@p1 is positioned centrally within the frame, donning a tan blazer over a blue button-down shirt. He occupies a seat at a dark-colored workstation where a black \"TOSHIBA\" laptop is situated on the left flank. A substantial professional-grade microphone mounted on an adjustable articulated arm stands before him. Behind @p1, a wooden shelving unit is packed with various literature, including a prominent spine titled \"BLACKWATER\" in stark white typography. His gaze is primarily fixated on the camera lens, with occasional downward glances at documents on his desk, punctuated by expressive manual gestures.",
    "person": [
      "the short dark hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 22.39,
    "end_time": 103.0,
    "summary": "The scene shifts to a newsroom environment featuring @p2 on the right side of a split-screen configuration. Wearing a beige suit paired with a striped necktie, @p2 is engrossed in examining a laptop and various loose-leaf papers. The left side of the frame provides a scenic backdrop of the United States Capitol building set against an expansive azure sky. A horizontal graphic at the bottom identifies the program as [WASHINGTON JOURNAL] with the primary topic listed as [CIVIL RIGHTS ACT: 50 YEARS LATER]. A location identifier specifies a [CALL FROM Maryland], and a red \"TPM\" watermark is visible in the lower right corner.",
    "person": [
      "the short brown hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 103.0,
    "end_time": 113.0,
    "summary": "The screen displays a composite graphic centered on a microblogging post against a neutral white background. The top section features the Washington Journal's branding and handle [@cspanwj], referencing the historical significance of President Lyndon B. Johnson's 1964 legislation. Below this, a specific tweet from @p4 (Danny Anson) is showcased, bearing the handle [@1Anson1] and stating: [@cspanwj The racist are those set out to destroy the nations white identity, that is racist.]. To the left, a vertical list of digital contact methods is presented: [twitter.com/cspanwj], [facebook.com/cspan], and [journal@c-span.org], while the \"TPM\" logo remains in its designated spot.",
    "person": [
      "Danny Anson"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 113.0,
    "end_time": 165.0,
    "summary": "Returning to the primary C-SPAN studio view, @p2 is seen amidst a graphic overlay providing audience participation numbers. The list includes contact digits for [Democrats 202-585-3880], [Republicans 202-585-3881], [Independents 202-585-3882], and [Outside U.S. 202-585-3883]. @p2 is observed manipulating physical papers on his desk while attentively monitoring the incoming audio. The lower-third banner transitions to announce a [CALL FROM Ohio]. The Capitol vista continues to occupy the left side of the screen, maintaining visual continuity.",
    "person": [
      "the short brown hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 165.0,
    "end_time": 212.0,
    "summary": "The focus remains on @p2 as he facilitates the ongoing dialogue, leaning forward over his desk with a writing implement in hand. He appears to be meticulously reviewing the documents before him while the red live-status indicator at the top right now reads [7:30 am ET]. The lower-third information bar is updated to indicate a [CALL FROM North Carolina]. The overall layout remains consistent, with @p2 framed on the right and the Capitol building visible through the virtual window on the left.",
    "person": [
      "the short brown hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 212.0,
    "end_time": 362.0,
    "summary": "The visual reverts to @p1 in his original studio environment, where he sits with hands interlocked on the desk surface. He initially looks down at his notes with a pensive expression before addressing the camera directly with renewed vigor. His discourse is accompanied by fluid hand movements used for emphasis as he analyzes the previous clips. The lighting arrangement highlights @p1, leaving the book-filled shelf in the background with a soft focus. The black \"TOSHIBA\" laptop and the articulating microphone arm remain as static elements in the foreground.",
    "person": [
      "the short dark hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 362.329,
    "end_time": 375.079,
    "summary": "@p1 is shown in a medium shot, seated at a desk in a dark-walled studio. He is dressed in a tan blazer over a blue-and-white vertically striped button-down shirt. His hands are loosely clasped on the table in front of him, and he frequently gestures with them while speaking, his gaze directed slightly off-camera toward a script or notes. Behind him to the right, a wooden bookshelf is filled with numerous books, including a visible white spine with the title [BLACKWATER] in bold black lettering. To @p1's left, an adjustable black microphone arm extends across the frame, with the microphone itself positioned close to his face. The lower-left corner shows a portion of a black \"TOSHIBA\" laptop lid.",
    "person": [
      "the short dark hair man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 375.079,
    "end_time": 378.812,
    "summary": "@p1 continues his monologue, leaning forward slightly as he emphasizes his points with wide, sweeping hand movements. He repeatedly opens his palms and extends his arms outward to the sides, his expression shifting from serious to incredulous. The lighting is focused primarily on him, creating a clear distinction from the dark background and the out-of-focus bookshelf behind him. On the desk, several white papers are laid out, and @p1 occasionally glances down at them before looking back up toward the camera lens. The black microphone, mounted on its articulating arm, remains a prominent foreground element on the left side of the shot.",
    "person": [
      "the short dark hair man"
    ]
  }
]

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/32414be4/32414be4_chunk1.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 117927,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 46
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Analyze the whole video as one segment: create one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown. Create at most 30 segments, and keep each segment’s length between 0 and 45 seconds inclusive.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Explain who appears, what they are doing, where it takes place, how the camera moves, and any visible text in [brackets]."
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Vinny Motwani (Reporter)
- Deven Choksey (Guest Analyst)
- Sam Altman (CEO of OpenAI)
- Rima Tendulkar (Studio Anchor)
- Nigel D'Souza (Studio Anchor)
- Mukesh Ambani (Chairman of Reliance Industries)
- N. Chandrasekaran (Chairman of Tata Sons)
- Shibani Sircar Kurian (Guest Analyst)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Treat the entire video as a single segment and analyze it as a whole: produce one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Explain who appears, what they are doing, where it takes place, how the camera moves, and any visible text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

Rendered assistant target

{
  "roster": [
    {
      "name": "woman_3",
      "description": "Woman in her late 20s with long dark hair, wearing a patterned sleeveless top."

      "name": "Nigel",
      "description": "Man in his mid-30s with short black hair, wearing a light blue dress shirt and a blue-and-orange striped tie."
    },
    {
      "name": "Shibani Sirkar Kurian",
      "description": "Woman in her late 30s with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses, wearing a white blouse and dark blazer, appearing in a profile photo for an upcoming segment."
    }
  ],
  "shot": [
    {
      "start_time": 0.0,
      "end_time": 0.625,
      "description": "A split-screen layout features woman_3, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a patterned sleeveless top, speaking into a smartphone in a remote video box on the left. On the right, man_4 is shown in his video box. Central text boxes detail the [CLSA View] on [Dixon Tech]: [Downgrade to Hold from Outperform] and [Cut Target to 12,100 from 15,800]. Market data shows [Dixon Tech 11233.00 2.49%] and [Adani Ent 2168.60 2.01%]. A small video box on the upper right shows man_7, a young man with short dark hair in a suit, with text [SAM ALTMAN To CNBC-TV18].",
      "entity": [
        {

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Analyze the whole video as one segment: create one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown. Create at most 30 segments, and keep each segment’s length between 0 and 45 seconds inclusive.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Explain who appears, what they are doing, where it takes place, how the camera moves, and any visible text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

  "entity_sme_render": {
    "output_structure": "consolidated",
    "mode": "asr",
    "asr_source": "whisper",
    "representation": "object",
    "naming_fallback": "described",
    "entity_count": "main",
    "roster_tier": "main",
    "summary": true,
    "roster_exposure": "distractor"

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/09e3c8a9/09e3c8a9_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 86292,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 102
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Watch and analyze the entire video end-to-end as a single continuous segment (do not divide it into multiple parts or sections). Then, produce one consolidated record that includes (1) the full roster and (2) a complete shot breakdown derived from the video. Segment the video into exactly 30 distinct parts, ensuring the total segment count is precisely 30.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the main characters in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Donald Trump (President of the United States)
- Paul Hudson (CEO of Sanofi)
- Vas Narasimhan (CEO of Novartis)
- Ashley Magargel (CEO of Genentech)
- Jean-Michel Boers (President of Boehringer Ingelheim)
- Dan O'Day (CEO of Gilead)
- Carrie Gallman (Executive Vice President of Bristol-Myers Squibb)
- Emma Walmsley (CEO of GSK)
- Rob Davis (CEO of Merck)
- Peter Griffith (Executive Vice President and CFO of Amgen)
- Robert F. Kennedy Jr. (Secretary of Health and Human Services (Designee))
- Howard Lutnick (Secretary of Commerce (Designee))
- Mehmet Oz (CMS Administrator (Designee))
- Marty Makary (FDA Commissioner (Designee))

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

    "start_time": 0.0,

    "summary": "A wide shot captures a formal room within the White House, where several individuals in dark business attire stand in a line. @p1 enters from a doorway on the right, carrying a black folder. A digital display on the far right lists various pharmaceutical companies under a heading. The room is decorated with traditional white molding and two large paintings. [CNBC live], [LOWER DRUG PRICES], [GSK], [sanofi], [Amgen], [Genentech], [THE AMER...].",

      "Donald Trump"

  },

    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 100.433,
    "end_time": 114.1,
    "summary": "The camera pulls back to a medium shot of @p1 at the podium. He continues to hold the gold card and uses his left hand to gesture toward the people standing behind him. The executives listen intently, some nodding slightly as he speaks. The lighting is bright and even across the scene.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 114.1,
    "end_time": 131.8,
    "summary": "Returning to a close-up, @p1 holds the gold card near his chest as he speaks with conviction. His expression is concentrated, and he frequently uses the card as a visual aid. The focus remains sharp on his face and the card.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 131.8,
    "end_time": 173.6,
    "summary": "From a medium shot, @p1 is seen continuing his speech, occasionally referring to documents on the podium. He gestures with both hands to emphasize specific points about the economy. The executives behind him maintain a professional and still posture.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 173.6,
    "end_time": 189.933,
    "summary": "@p1 is shown in another close-up, holding the gold card up once more. He uses the tip of his finger to point out specific text or features on the card's surface. He looks directly at the camera while explaining the card's significance.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 189.933,
    "end_time": 258.133,
    "summary": "In a medium shot, @p1 sets the card aside and starts reading from notes prepared on the podium. He looks up frequently to maintain eye contact with the viewers. His red tie provides a sharp contrast against his white dress shirt and dark navy suit.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 258.133,
    "end_time": 264.7,
