    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 264.7,
    "end_time": 347.933,
    "summary": "The camera moves in for a close-up as @p1 speaks emphatically about employment statistics. He uses vigorous hand gestures to highlight his points. His brow is slightly furrowed as he delivers his message.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 347.933,
    "end_time": 366.133,
    "summary": "In a medium shot, @p1 makes a broad sweeping gesture with his arm toward the executives behind him. He acknowledges them as leaders in the pharmaceutical industry. The executives look on, maintaining their formal positions in the line.",

      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 366.133,

      "Rob Davis"

      "Peter Griffith"

      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },

      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 1019.633,
    "end_time": 1019.685,
    "summary": "@p1 mentions the website [TrumpRx.gov], speaking clearly and forcefully. He highlights a dramatic price reduction for the medication Plavix, illustrating the scale of the change with expansive hand gestures. The camera stays tightly framed on him, capturing his animated facial expressions.",
    "person": [
      "Donald Trump"
    ]
  }
]

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Analyze this video in its entirety as one segment (do not split it into parts); output a single record containing the roster and the shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the main characters in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Watch and analyze the entire video end-to-end as a single continuous segment (do not divide it into multiple parts or sections). Then, produce one consolidated record that includes (1) the full roster and (2) a complete shot breakdown derived from the video. Segment the video into exactly 30 distinct parts, ensuring the total segment count is precisely 30.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe who is on screen, what they do, the setting, the camera work, and transcribe any on-screen text in [brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the main characters in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

  {

    "sampling": {

      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Segment every significant shot change. People in this video: Studio Anchor (length blonde hair woman); Vaugh Hillyard (short brown hair man); Michael Steele (man); Symone Sanders-Townsend (woman); Brendan Boyle (styled hair short man); Donald Trump (blonde hair man); Dasha Burns (blonde hair woman).\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "description",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "describe:\nWHO: people on screen, their appearance, expressions, body language\nWHAT: actions, gestures, interactions, events\nWHERE: setting, location, environment\nHOW: camera angle and movement\nOCR: any on-screen text — lower-thirds, chyrons, banners, tickers, name straps, headlines, location labels, timestamps, scores, titles, signs. Transcribe the EXACT text shown in [brackets]."
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Vaugh Hillyard (Field Correspondent)
- Alicia Menendez (Studio Anchor)
- Symone Sanders-Townsend (Panelist)
- Michael Steele (Panelist)
- Brendan Boyle (Interviewee)
- Donald Trump (Interviewee)
- Dasha Burns (Interviewer)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

    "start_time": 0.0,

    "summary": "@p2 stands in the center of the frame, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and a blue tie. He holds a microphone and looks directly into the camera. Behind him, a large crowd is gathered in a dimly lit arena. On-screen text in the upper left corner reads [MOUNT POCONO, PA.] and [7:03 PM]. A red and black banner at the bottom displays [BREAKING NEWS] and [SOON: TRUMP RALLIES AS VOTERS SOUR ON HIS ECONOMIC AGENDA].",

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Segment every significant shot changes. Please use these additional information

People appearing in this video:
- the length blonde hair woman: Studio Anchor. the length blonde hair woman
- Vaugh Hillyard: Field Correspondent. the short brown hair short man
- Michael Steele: Panelist. the man
- Symone Sanders-Townsend: Panelist. the woman
- Brendan Boyle: Interviewee. the styled hair short man
- Donald Trump: Interviewee. the with blonde hair man
- Dasha Burns: Interviewer. the with blonde hair woman

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "describe:\nWHO: people on screen, their appearance, expressions, body language\nWHAT: actions, gestures, interactions, events\nWHERE: setting, location, environment\nHOW: camera angle and movement\nOCR: any on-screen text — lower-thirds, chyrons, banners, tickers, name straps, headlines, location labels, timestamps, scores, titles, signs. Transcribe the EXACT text shown in [brackets]."
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Segment every significant shot change. People in this video: Studio Anchor (length blonde hair woman); Vaugh Hillyard (short brown hair man); Michael Steele (man); Symone Sanders-Townsend (woman); Brendan Boyle (styled hair short man); Donald Trump (blonde hair man); Dasha Burns (blonde hair woman).
```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "describe:\nWHO: people on screen, their appearance, expressions, body language\nWHAT: actions, gestures, interactions, events\nWHERE: setting, location, environment\nHOW: camera angle and movement\nOCR: any on-screen text — lower-thirds, chyrons, banners, tickers, name straps, headlines, location labels, timestamps, scores, titles, signs. Transcribe the EXACT text shown in [brackets]."
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

    "description": "A full-screen graphic appears with the heading [THE CENTURY FOUNDATION] in red. Below it, the text reads ['Tis the Season for Price Hikes: Popular Holiday Gifts Climb 26 Percent Under Trump]. The date [December 9, 2025] is shown. The graphic includes a photograph of several wrapped presents under a Christmas tree. Additional text at the bottom says [New analysis... finds that many of this season's most popular holiday gifts are significantly more expensive under President Trump, with prices rising an average of 26 percent since last year—nearly nine times the overall inflation rate...]. Row metadata and decisions

{
  "domain": "news",
  "source_dataset": "tl_dense_caption_v1_1",
  "media_path": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/594ae581/594ae581_chunk0.mp4",
  "chunk_start": 0.0,
  "chunk_end": 720.0,
  "entity_sme_render": {
    "output_structure": "consolidated",
    "mode": "asr",
    "asr_source": "whisper",
    "representation": "object",
    "naming_fallback": "numbering",
    "entity_count": "main+supporting",
    "roster_tier": "main",
    "summary": false,
    "roster_exposure": "partial"
  },
  "segment_instruction_rule": {
    "segment_count": {
      "variant": "exact",
      "value": 18
    },
    "segment_duration": {
      "variant": "max",
      "max": 88
    }
  },
  "shot_names_missing_from_roster": []
}

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/594ae581/594ae581_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 120470,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 26
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Analyze the entire video as a single segment; output one record with the roster and shot breakdown. Produce exactly 18 segments total, and keep each segment under or equal to 88 seconds in length.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Pramila Jayapal (U.S. Representative (WA-07))
- Sydney Kamlager-Dove (U.S. Representative (CA-37))
- Teresa Helm (Survivor and Advocate)
- Stacy Jewell (Survivor and Advocate)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 83.5,
    "summary": "A wide shot captures a press conference taking place outside on the grounds of the U.S. Capitol building, with the iconic dome visible in the background under a pale, overcast sky. @p1 stands at a wooden podium equipped with several microphones, delivering an address to an unseen audience of reporters. Affixed to the front of the podium is a purple sign with bold white lettering that reads [WE STAND WITH SURVIVORS DWC]. Behind @p1, a diverse group of approximately twenty people stands in a semi-circle, some wearing white t-shirts printed with [WE STAND WITH SURVIVORS]. The camera alternates between this wide perspective and a medium shot of @p1, who wears rectangular glasses and a black coat over a black shirt.",
    "person": [
      "Pramila Jayapal"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 83.5,
    "end_time": 165.666,

In the foreground, a photographer kneeling on the pavement is partially visible, holding a professional camera equipped with a long lens. The people gathered behind the speaker remain mostly still, their breaths visible in the cold air as they listen attentively. The ground around the podium is wet with patches of melting snow scattered along the edges of the walkway.",

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Analyze this video in its entirety as one segment (do not split it into parts); output a single record containing the roster and the shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",

        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Analyze the entire video as a single segment; output one record with the roster and shot breakdown. Produce exactly 18 segments total, and keep each segment under or equal to 88 seconds in length.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

Row metadata and decisions

  "domain": "movie",

  "chunk_end": 4149.0,

    "output_structure": "consolidated",

  {
    "type": "video",

  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Nick Pearson (Protagonist)
- Richard (Husband)
- Kelly (Sister)
- Sydni Dell Bartlett (Fiancée)
- Mason (Son)
- The Amazing Fabular (Medium)
- Skyler Cross (Former Girlfriend)
- Joanna (Former Girlfriend)
- Frankie Bartlett (Minor Character)
- Lenny Bartlett (Minor Character)
- Rachel Bartlett (Minor Character)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 1.984,
    "summary": "The shot ends with @p6 walking out of the studio, the camera capturing his exit from a low angle. The bright exterior light streams in through the open door, creating a strong contrast with the interior shadows. The sound of children's voices and the general activity of the studio fade into the background as he leaves. @p6's physical pain is still evident in his slightly limping step, but his expression is one of newfound determination. The overall scene is one of a challenging task accomplished and a new direction for his search.",
    "person": [
      "Nick Pearson"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1.984,
    "end_time": 8.96,
    "summary": "The final cut shows @p6 on the sidewalk outside the studio, taking a deep breath and looking at his notebook. The sunlight is bright, and the urban environment is bustling with typical city life. He looks in both directions before deciding on his next move. The circular logo of the Hapkido studio is visible on the glass door behind him. The scene concludes with @p6 walking away from the building, his pace gradually picking up as he focuses on his next lead. The overall mood is one of renewed purpose and the continuation of his quest.",
    "person": [
      "Nick Pearson"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 8.96,
    "end_time": 14.28,
    "summary": "The scene transitions to an aerial shot of a massive traffic jam on a multi-lane highway. Hundreds of cars and trucks are seen at a standstill, their colors creating a mosaic of metal and glass on the grey asphalt. The sunlight reflects off the surfaces, making the scene feel hot and oppressive. Large green highway signs are visible overhead, with text indicating exits for [Jefferson Blvd], [Marina del Rey], and [Slauson Ave]. The overall atmosphere is one of frustration and immobility on a busy day.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 14.28,
    "end_time": 19.514,
    "summary": "In a closer shot from within a car, @p28 is shown leaning out of his window, his face contorted in frustration as he shouts at the stationary cars in front of him. He is a man in his 40s with dark hair and a beard, wearing a plaid shirt. His hands are gripped tightly on the steering wheel, and his eyes are filled with a mix of anger and desperation. The interior of the car is cluttered with personal items, and a bag of chips is visible on the passenger seat. The sound of distant car horns can be heard in the background.",
    "person": [
      "Richard"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 19.514,
    "end_time": 24.442,
    "summary": "@p28 then pulls his head back into the car and looks at his phone, which is mounted on the dashboard and displaying a video call. The screen shows @p11 in her hospital bed, her face flushed and glistening with sweat as she's in the middle of labor. @p28's expression immediately shifts to one of concern and panic as he talks to her. The car's interior is bright, with sunlight streaming through the windshield. The dashboard also features a GPS screen showing a map of the surrounding area, with a red line indicating a congested route.",
    "person": [
      "Richard",
      "Kelly"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 24.442,
    "end_time": 29.514,
    "summary": "A quick cut to the hospital shows @p11 from the front as she lies in her bed, her hands clutching the sheets as a contraction hits her. She is surrounded by medical staff, including @p10, who is holding a damp cloth to @p11's forehead. @p11 is holding her phone up, looking at @p28 on the screen with an expression of pure fury. The delivery room is bright and sterile, with various medical monitors and equipment visible in the background. @p11's scream of pain is clearly seen as she yells at her husband through the video call.",
    "person": [
      "Kelly",
      "Sydni Dell Bartlett",
      "Richard"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 29.514,
    "end_time": 34.442,
    "summary": "Back in the car, @p28 is shown looking at @p11 on his phone screen, his face etched with a sense of helplessness and guilt. He's talking frantically to her, his gestures mirroring the intensity of his words as he tries to explain the traffic situation. The camera captures his reflection in the car's mirrors, adding to the layered and frantic nature of the scene. The GPS screen on the dashboard shows a time of [8:52], and the red line of traffic congestion seems to stretch indefinitely. The overall mood is one of extreme stress and emotional turmoil.",
    "person": [
      "Richard",
      "Kelly"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 34.442,
    "end_time": 38.46,
    "summary": "In a final shot of the car, @p28 is seen slumped back in his seat for a moment, his eyes squeezed shut as he absorbs @p11's anger. He then looks back at the road and then at the phone, his expression turning to one of grim determination. He starts to speak again, his voice likely filled with promises and apologies. The camera pulls back to show the car from a distance, still stuck in the endless sea of stationary vehicles. The scene concludes with the sounds of @p11's screams through the phone and the persistent honking of car horns in the distance.",
    "person": [
      "Richard",
      "Kelly"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 38.46,
    "end_time": 42.071,
    "summary": "The scene transitions back to the front of the Hapkido studio, where @p6, @p13, and @p1 are coming out onto the sidewalk. @p27 follows them out, her red hair tied in a ponytail and her white martial arts uniform standing out against the brick building. @p6 is laughing, his face flushed and his expression lighthearted. @p13 walks beside him, looking between the adults with curiosity. @p1 leads the way with the small dog on a leash, his vibrant pink shirt a bright focal point in the sunny scene.",
    "person": [
      "Nick Pearson",
      "Mason",
      "The Amazing Fabular",
      "Skyler Cross"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 42.071,
    "end_time": 46.4,
    "summary": "In a closer shot, @p27 is shown stopping on the sidewalk and looking at @p1 with an expression of sudden recognition. Her eyes widen, and she points a finger at him, her face breaking into a wide, slightly mischievous smile. @p1 looks back at her, his expression turning from confusion to one of mild apprehension. @p6 and @p13 watch the interaction with interest, their smiles fading as the atmosphere becomes more serious. The bright sunlight catches the fine details of their clothing and expressions.",
    "person": [
      "Skyler Cross",
      "The Amazing Fabular",
      "Nick Pearson",
      "Mason"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 46.4,
    "end_time": 50.276,
    "summary": "The camera angle shifts to show @p27 from @p1's perspective, emphasizing her confident and knowing posture. She speaks directly to him, her voice likely filled with a name from his past. @p1's expression shifts further toward discomfort, and he tries to look away, but @p27 continues her revelation. @p6 and @p13 are now looking at @p1 with wide-eyed surprise, their curiosity piqued by @p27's words. The brick building and a portion of the sidewalk are visible in the background.",
    "person": [
      "Skyler Cross",
      "The Amazing Fabular",
      "Nick Pearson",
      "Mason"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 50.276,
    "end_time": 55.071,
    "summary": "In a close-up of @p27's face, she is shown talking animatedly, her expressions changing rapidly as she details her memory of @p1. She looks between @p6 and @p1, her eyes sparkling with a mix of amusement and a hint of accusation. The depth of field is shallow, keeping the focus entirely on her emotional reaction and the impact of her words. The sunlight catches the fine strands of her red hair and the intensity in her gaze. The overall mood is one of personal confrontation and a sudden shift in @p1's credibility.",
    "person": [
      "Skyler Cross",
      "The Amazing Fabular",
      "Nick Pearson"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 55.071,
    "end_time": 59.442,
    "summary": "Back to a medium shot, @p1 is shown trying to defend himself, his gestures becoming more frantic as he tries to deny @p27's claims. He looks at @p6 and @p13, seeking validation or support in their eyes, but their expressions remain skeptical. @p27 continues her relentless exposé, her smile never wavering as she reveals more embarrassing details. The small dog sits patiently on the sidewalk, oblivious to the humans' unfolding drama. The overall atmosphere is one of high-stakes social discomfort and a sudden revelation of hidden truths.",
    "person": [
      "The Amazing Fabular",
      "Skyler Cross",
      "Nick Pearson",
      "Mason"

  },

    "summary": "The camera angle changes to show @p6 and @p13 from @p27's perspective, capturing their reactions of pure shock and disbelief. @p13's mouth is slightly agape, and @p6 looks at @p1 with a mix of confusion and mounting anger. @p1's vibrant pink shirt now seems to highlight his vulnerability in this moment. The brick building and the sunny street provide a stark background to the personal crisis unfolding on the sidewalk. The scene ends with @p27's triumphant expression as she finishes her story.",

      "The Amazing Fabular"

    "start_time": 64.31,
    "end_time": 69.514,
    "summary": "In a closer shot of @p1, his expression is one of utter defeat and mild embarrassment as he realizes his past has been laid bare. He looks down at his dog for a moment, his shoulders slumped. @p6 is now speaking to him, his voice likely filled with a mix of questions and accusations. @p13 watches his father and @p1, his expression one of confusion and sadness. The overall mood is one of a shattered illusion and a sudden shift in the group's dynamic. The sunlight continues to shine brightly on the scene, making the emotional turmoil feel even more prominent.",

      "The Amazing Fabular",

    "summary": "A close-up of @p13's face shows him looking at @p1 with a mix of disappointment and a lingering sense of affection.     "summary": "In a medium shot of the group, @p6 is now looking at @p27, his expression one of focused curiosity as he asks her for more information. 2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Analyze this video in its entirety as one segment (do not split it into parts); output a single record containing the roster and the shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Analyze this video in its entirety as one segment (do not split it into parts); output a single record containing the roster and the shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Produce a shot-by-shot segmentation of this video, using the additional information to identify people. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

    "text": "Analyze the whole video as one segment: create one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown. Use no more than 49 segments total, and ensure every segment has a duration of at least 0 seconds.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Hershel Rhee (Supporting Character)
- Maggie Rhee (Protagonist)
- Perlie Armstrong (Supporting Character)
- Mila (Supporting Character)
- Negan Smith (Protagonist/Anti-hero)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

    "start_time": 349.9,

The hallway is dimly lit and narrow, with several closed doors and faint flickering lights in the distance. 2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Treat the entire video as a single segment and analyze it as a whole: produce one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Analyze the whole video as one segment: create one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown. Use no more than 49 segments total, and ensure every segment has a duration of at least 0 seconds.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Split the video into segments at each meaningful shot change, with the help of the notes below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

  "domain": "news",

  "chunk_end": 656.866667,

    "output_structure": "consolidated",

    "asr_source": "whisper",

    "naming_fallback": "numbering",
    "entity_count": "all",

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/5d7ff904/5d7ff904_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 164718,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Consider the whole video as one segment and produce one consolidated analysis: the roster of people and the per-shot detail.\n\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main and supporting people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Sam Seder (Anchor)
- Emma Vigeland (Co-Host)
- Charlamagne Tha God (Host)
- Andrew Schulz (Interviewee)
- David Peisner (Contributor)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 2.268,
    "summary": "The video commences with an introductory animation featuring a three-dimensional block shaped like a book, which revolves within a vintage television set's frame. The text on the cover of the block clearly displays [THE MAJORITY REPORT WITH SAM SEDER]. The surrounding TV console is dark grey with silver knobs and a tuning dial on the right side. This stylized opening transitions into the live studio broadcast.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 2.268,
    "end_time": 23.0,
    "summary": "Transitioning to the studio, @p1 and @p2 are positioned behind a broadcast desk equipped with large professional microphones. @p1, on the right, wears a light blue button-down shirt and black-rimmed spectacles, speaking with animated hand gestures. @p2 sits to his left in an olive green sweater, looking towards @p1 or the camera with a neutral expression. A red and white lower-third graphic at the bottom of the frame reads [THE MAJORITY REPORT WITH SAM SEDER]. The background consists of a colorful grid of square light panels in shades of blue, purple, and red.",
    "person": [
      "Sam Seder",
      "Emma Vigeland"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 23.0,
    "end_time": 43.0,
    "summary": "The camera shifts to a closer shot focused on @p1 as he continues his discussion, maintaining the same light blue attire and glasses. He looks directly at the camera, his hands intermittently entering the frame to emphasize his points. @p2 remains partially visible on the left side of the frame, her gaze directed towards him. The studio environment is warmly lit, highlighting the textures of the desk and the equipment.",
    "person": [
      "Sam Seder",
      "Emma Vigeland"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 43.0,
    "end_time": 65.398,
    "summary": "Returning to a medium shot, @p1 and @p2 are both visible, with @p2 laughing at a joke made by @p1. She leans back slightly, her expression full of mirth, while @p1 smiles broadly and continues to speak. The background grid of lights softly glows, and the lower-third banner [THE MAJORITY REPORT WITH SAM SEDER] stays consistent. The professional atmosphere of the studio is balanced by the hosts' casual and engaging rapport.",

      "Sam Seder",

    "start_time": 65.398,

Between them, video footage shows Nicol\u0000s Maduro speaking at a podium. A prominent blue headline banner at the bottom states [WH DESIGNATES MADURO AS MEMBER OF FOREIGN TERRORIST ORGANIZATION]. Smaller text on the right side of the screen identifies @p4 as [MARIA ELVIRA SALAZAR (R) FLORIDA CONGRESSWOMAN].",

      "Charlamagne Tha God",
      "Andrew Schulz"

    "start_time": 94.0,

Below it, a secondary banner says [U.S. DESIGNATES MADURO-LINKED GROUP AS FOREIGN TERRORIST ORGANIZATION]. The background behind her features the blurred cityscape of Miami with skyscrapers and a clear sky.",
    "person": [
      "Andrew Schulz"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 123.957,

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Consider the whole video as one segment and produce one consolidated analysis: the roster of people and the per-shot detail.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main and supporting people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Consider the whole video as one segment and produce one consolidated analysis: the roster of people and the per-shot detail.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main and supporting people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Use full names when known; for unnamed people, assign an index label such as `man_1` (always with a description)."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/4c75f99c/4c75f99c_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 88786,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 54
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Review the entire video from start to finish and locate every moment where a significant shot change occurs (for example, a clear cut to a new camera angle, a transition to a different framing or viewpoint, or any comparable visual shift that meaningfully alters the composition). For each detected shot change, produce a segmented breakdown of the video into consecutive sections, ensuring that each segment is defined by the corresponding start and end points created by those changes. When constructing these segments, use the provided cast information to guide identification and attribution of who is appearing on screen (Susan Swain and Elliot Morris), applying their roles and descriptions to interpret the visual context accurately.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting. Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a brief appearance description.",
            "items_type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- G. Elliott Morris (Data Journalist, The Economist)
- Susan Swain (Host, C-SPAN's Q&A)
- Anderson Cooper (CNN Anchor)
- Chris Cuomo (CNN Anchor)
- Kellyanne Conway (Trump Campaign Manager)
- Anthony Salvanto (CBS News Elections Director)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 6.732,
    "summary": "A medium shot of @p2, a man with short dark brown hair, a full beard, and round glasses, wearing a blue denim-style button-down shirt. He is looking slightly away from the camera with a neutral, pleasant expression. The background is a soft-focus outdoor scene with a hint of buildings and a clear sky at dusk.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 6.732,
    "end_time": 15.367,

She is sitting in a professional television studio, looking directly at the camera while speaking. A blue lower-third banner identifies her as [Susan Swain | Host, C-SPAN's Q&A].",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {

Elliott Morris | Data Journalist, The Economist]. He blinks and maintains a composed posture while waiting to begin the interview.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 48.378,
    "end_time": 68.514,
    "summary": "A wide shot of the C-SPAN studio features @p1 seated on the left and @p2 on the right, both in black leather armchairs facing each other. Between them is a dark wooden table holding a laptop and a copy of Morris's book, titled [STRENGTH IN NUMBERS: HOW POLLS WORK AND WHY WE NEED THEM] by [G. ELLIOTT MORRIS]. The studio has a professional atmosphere with blue and gray accent walls.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 68.514,
    "end_time": 131.285,
    "summary": "A close-up of @p2 as he begins to speak reveals him gesturing slightly with his hands while explaining his perspective on polling. The camera remains steady on his face, capturing his round glasses and full beard. He maintains direct eye contact with @p1 off-camera.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 131.285,
    "end_time": 204.421,
    "summary": "A medium shot of @p2 shows him continuing to discuss his work, his expression becoming more animated as he describes the data journalist's role. He leans slightly forward, conveying engagement in the topic. The lighting is bright and even across the frame, highlighting the texture of his denim shirt.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 204.421,
    "end_time": 284.797,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to @p1, who listens to @p2's explanation and nods occasionally to show her attentiveness. Her hands are resting in her lap, and she maintains a focused gaze on her guest. She then asks a follow-up question about his academic background and training.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 284.797,
    "end_time": 301.672,
    "summary": "A wide shot of the studio shows both individuals in the frame again. @p1 is gesturing with her hands as she transitions the conversation toward election polling failures. @p2 watches her, preparing to respond to the shift in topic.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 301.672,
    "end_time": 305.973,
    "summary": "A news compilation clip begins with @p3 (Anderson Cooper) on CNN, looking directly into the camera with a serious expression. A large white banner at the bottom of the screen reads [HOW COULD THE POLLS HAVE MISSED THIS SO BADLY?].",
    "person": [
      "Anderson Cooper"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 305.973,
    "end_time": 314.341,
    "summary": "The montage of news anchors and pundits continues with a shot of @p4 (Chris Cuomo) on CNN. He is speaking urgently with a banner beneath him that reads [HOW DID THE POLLS MISS THIS?].",
    "person": [
      "Chris Cuomo"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 314.341,
    "end_time": 325.539,
    "summary": "The video cuts to @p5 (Kellyanne Conway) wearing a bright red dress, gesturing while speaking on a news set. The screen displays a series of text overlays reporting Biden's polling leads, such as [BIDEN IS UP BY 10], [BIDEN IS UP BY 12], and [BIDEN IS UP BY 15].",
    "person": [
      "Kellyanne Conway"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 325.539,
    "end_time": 374.707,
    "summary": "The montage concludes with @p6 (Anthony Salvanto) and other pundits discussing poll results. Salvanto is seen in a dark suit and glasses against a newsroom backdrop. Various text banners flash on screen, including mentions of the popular vote and specific polling groups like the [Trafalgar Group].",
    "person": [
      "Anthony Salvanto"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 374.707,
    "end_time": 410.0,
    "summary": "A close-up of @p2 back in the studio shows him responding to the criticisms from the compilation. He speaks directly to @p1, his eyes moving as he explains the polling failures of 2016. He maintains a calm and analytical demeanor while addressing the public's frustration.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 410.0,
    "end_time": 497.0,
    "summary": "The camera cuts between close-ups of @p2 speaking and occasional reaction shots of @p1 listening intently. @p2 uses subtle hand movements to describe statistical sampling methods and the concept of differential non-response. @p1 sits perfectly still, focusing all her attention on her guest's technical explanation.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 497.0,
    "end_time": 549.447,
    "summary": "A medium shot of @p2 shows him continuing his explanation of the 2016 polling miss while leaning slightly back in his chair. The camera angle is from the side, capturing his profile as he explains why Republicans were less likely to answer phone polls. He looks at @p1 throughout the explanation.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 549.447,
    "end_time": 580.0,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to @p1 as she asks a concluding question for this segment about the challenges of national polling. She gestures with her right hand toward @p2 to invite his response. The camera then moves to a wide shot of both participants in their armchairs before the video chunk ends.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 580.0,
    "end_time": 603.751,
    "summary": "A tight close-up focuses on @p2, who is speaking while looking slightly to the left of the camera. He has short, dark brown hair and a full beard, and he is wearing round glasses that catch a green reflection from the studio lights. Over the bottom of the frame, a white text overlay reads [STRENGTH IN NUMBERS] in large bold letters, with [G. ELLIOTT MORRIS] and [DATA JOURNALIST, THE ECONOMIST] displayed in a smaller font below. The background is out of focus, showing indistinct colors from the studio. @p2 maintains a steady, serious expression as he makes his points.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 603.751,
    "end_time": 613.2,
    "summary": "The camera cuts to a wide shot of the interview set, showing @p1 on the left and @p2 on the right. Both are seated in grey armchairs facing each other at an angle, with a low wooden table placed between them. @p1 is wearing a light blue button-down shirt and glasses, and she is actively speaking with her right hand raised in a gesture. Behind them is a large blue and red studio wall graphic featuring the program name [Q&A] in white. The lighting is bright and consistent across the studio floor.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 613.2,
    "end_time": 675.807,
    "summary": "Returning to a close-up of @p2, he watches @p1 off-camera with a thoughtful expression before he begins to speak. He is positioned in the center of the frame against a blurred background. He wears a blue denim shirt, and the lenses of his glasses continue to show a faint green tint from the studio lights. @p2 speaks with measured movements, occasionally blinking and tilting his head as he articulates his points. His posture appears relaxed yet attentive in the centered shot.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 675.807,
    "end_time": 679.5,
    "summary": "The camera switches to a close-up of @p1 as she speaks. She is framed from the chest up, looking toward @p2 off-screen. Her expression is focused, and she nods slightly as she articulates her words. The background behind her is a soft-focus part of the studio set. Her short brown hair is neatly styled, and her glasses are firmly in place.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 679.5,
    "end_time": 753.0,
    "summary": "In this close-up, @p2 speaks while looking consistently toward @p1, his eyes moving as he gathers his thoughts. He uses subtle facial expressions to emphasize certain words, such as raising his eyebrows slightly. The denim fabric of his shirt is well-detailed in the sharp focus of the camera. The background remains a simple, blurred studio setting. He blinks naturally while delivering his explanation.",
    "person": [
      "G. Elliott Morris",
      "Susan Swain"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 753.0,
    "end_time": 764.5,
    "summary": "@p1 is shown in a close-up while she listens intently to @p2. She maintains eye contact with him off-camera and reacts with a slight nod of understanding. Her light blue shirt is crisp and well-lit. She is centered in the frame, with the background out of focus. She waits for a natural pause to continue the conversation.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 764.5,
    "end_time": 768.0,

The camera then cuts back to the close-up of @p2, who begins to speak again. He blinks and shifts his head slightly as he addresses his interlocutor. The transition between shots is a sharp cut.",
    "person": [
      "Susan Swain",
      "G. Elliott Morris"
    ]
  }
]
