3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Review the entire video from start to finish and locate every moment where a significant shot change occurs (for example, a clear cut to a new camera angle, a transition to a different framing or viewpoint, or any comparable visual shift that meaningfully alters the composition). For each detected shot change, produce a segmented breakdown of the video into consecutive sections, ensuring that each segment is defined by the corresponding start and end points created by those changes. When constructing these segments, use the provided cast information to guide identification and attribution of who is appearing on screen (Susan Swain and Elliot Morris), applying their roles and descriptions to interpret the visual context accurately.
```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"

                "name": "end_time",

                "type": "array",
                "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting. Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a brief appearance description.",
                "items_type": "string"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

[
  {

    "type": "text",
    "text": "Identify every significant shot change and output the resulting segments, using the supplied cast information.\n\nPeople appearing in this video:\n- Opal Lee: Interviewee. the elderly short grey hair short woman\n\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "description",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "Detailed visual caption covering people, actions, setting, camera work, and OCR text (in [brackets])."
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the main characters in this segment",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Norah O'Donnell (Anchor)
- Opal Lee (Interviewee)
- Steve Hartman (Correspondent)
- Gage Yeager (Interviewee)
- Gene Eister (Interviewee)
- Matthew Hegedus-Stewart (Interviewee)
- John Amalfitano (Interviewee)
- Mary Foss (Interviewee)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 9.976,
    "summary": "@p1, a female news anchor with brown hair, stands center-frame in a modern news studio. She is wearing a bright blue dress and holding a small white card. Behind her, a large vertical screen displays the program logo [CBS NEWS On the Road WITH STEVE HARTMAN] with an image of a country road. To her left, an on-the-set graphic shows a portrait of an elderly Black woman, @p3. To her right, another graphic shows a different portrait of @p3. In the top right corner, white text indicates the date [JUNE 14, 2024]. The studio has a glossy floor that reflects the bright lights and colorful set elements.",
    "person": [
      "Norah O'Donnell",
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 9.976,
    "end_time": 13.209,
    "summary": "Exterior shot of a black Ford F-150 truck parked on a quiet residential street on a sunny day. @p3, an elderly Black woman with short grey hair and glasses, is seen getting out of the driver's side of the vehicle. She wears a dark winter coat over grey trousers. She carefully steps onto the running board and then onto the pavement, using the door for balance.",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 13.209,
    "end_time": 29.129,
    "summary": "Close-up of @p3 as she completes her descent from the truck. She grips the inner handle of the door and the side of the seat to steady herself. Her expression is one of focus as she reaches the ground and begins to walk away from the vehicle. The sunlight is bright, and the background shows green trees and other houses on the street.",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 29.129,
    "end_time": 37.47,
    "summary": "A medium shot of @p3 sitting indoors in an ornate wooden armchair. She is wearing a white floral lace blouse over a dark blue t-shirt and her glasses. She is speaking and smiling, looking off-camera. Behind her, a piano and some framed pictures are visible. A blue and white lower-third graphic on the left side of the frame reads [On the Road] and [CBS EVENING NEWS with NORAH O'DONNELL].",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 37.47,
    "end_time": 43.71,
    "summary": "A close-up of @p3's hands as she uses scissors to carefully cut around a small card on a sheet of paper. The sheet contains several printed photographs of herself and various community events. She is seated at a table covered with papers and other items. Her movements are deliberate and steady as she works on her project.",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 43.71,
    "end_time": 50.143,
    "summary": "A montage of archival footage and photos. First, @p3 is shown walking down a city street in a vibrant pink and yellow windbreaker, surrounded by a crowd of people. She holds a sign that says [JUNETEENTH... A NATIONAL HOLIDAY!!]. Another person nearby holds a sign reading [Opals Walk 2 DC]. Then, a photograph appears of @p3 sitting in a chair while President Joe Biden kneels in front of her, holding her hands in the White House. People in the background are clapping.",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 50.143,
    "end_time": 56.249,
    "summary": "A close-up of @p3 speaking passionately outdoors. She is wearing her glasses and pointing her finger for emphasis. Her grey hair is short and curly. The background is a soft blur of trees and people. Her expression is intense and focused as she addresses an unseen audience.",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 56.249,
    "end_time": 69.436,
    "summary": "A black and white archival photograph of a young @p3 smiling radiantly. Then, a modern aerial drone shot shows a large, vacant green lot in a residential neighborhood. This is followed by a shot looking down a quiet street toward a [STOP] sign. An old newspaper clipping is overlaid on the screen with the headline [HOUSE SMASHED BY CROWD IS WATCHED]. The text begins [Police Tuesday were keeping watch over a house, recently occupied by a negro family, in the 900 block of East Annie Street].",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 69.436,
    "end_time": 80.4,
    "summary": "The video cuts between @p3 in her chair and @p2, a middle-aged male correspondent with short grey hair. @p2 is wearing a blue blazer over a light blue shirt and is listening intently to @p3 with a serious expression. @p3 is speaking, her gaze directed toward @p2. The lighting in the room is warm and soft. On-screen text at the top left says [On the Road].",
    "person": [
      "Opal Lee",
      "Steve Hartman"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 80.4,
    "end_time": 97.864,
    "summary": "@p2 stands in the middle of a large, grassy vacant lot. He is wearing a dark grey jacket and is speaking directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands. Behind him are bare trees and some distant houses. The scene then transitions to a shot of a small blue house with a sign that reads [Habitat for Humanity]. Another sign on a fence says [STAY STRONG].",
    "person": [
      "Steve Hartman"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 97.864,
    "end_time": 109.739,
    "summary": "Inside an office, @p4 is seated at a wooden desk, looking at a computer monitor. He is a middle-aged white man with short brown hair and glasses, wearing a blue blazer. He rests his chin on his hand in a contemplative pose. The wall behind him has several framed maps and documents. He appears to be focused on his work.",
    "person": [
      "Gage Yeager"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 109.739,
    "end_time": 116.973,
    "summary": "A close-up interview shot of @p4 sitting in a room with warm, ambient lighting. He is wearing a grey suit jacket and his glasses. He is speaking and looking slightly off-camera toward @p2. Then, the camera cuts to @p2, who is smiling warmly as he listens to @p4. The background is slightly out of focus.",
    "person": [
      "Gage Yeager",
      "Steve Hartman"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 116.973,

    "summary": "The camera cuts back and forth between @p3 laughing heartily in her wooden chair and @p2 smiling as he continues to listen. @p3's face is lit up with joy, and she leans back slightly as she laughs. @p2's expression is one of genuine amusement and warmth.     "person": [

      "Steve Hartman"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 128.551,

    "summary": "Out in the vacant grassy lot, @p4 and @p3 are walking together slowly. @p4 has his arm around @p3's shoulders. The ground is uneven and covered with dry grass.",
    "person": [

      "Opal Lee"
    ]

  {
    "start_time": 136.893,

    "summary": "A celebration is taking place on the porch of a new grey house. @p4, now wearing a yellow baseball cap and a checked shirt, stands with a microphone, talking to @p3. @p3 is seated in a white wooden rocking chair, wearing a bright yellow blouse and large sunglasses. She holds a black microphone and a small book. Several people are gathered behind them, clapping and smiling.",
    "person": [
      "Gage Yeager",
      "Opal Lee"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 146.969,

Many people in the crowd are taking photos with their phones.",
    "person": [

    ]
  },

    "person": [

    ]
  },

    "start_time": 186.109,

    "summary": "A high-angle aerial shot shows a modern city street with large buildings and walkways. This transitions to a shot of @p5, a retired police lieutenant, driving a grey truck.     "person": [
      "Gene Eister"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 205.028,

    "person": [
      "Gene Eister"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 218.641,
    "end_time": 235.758,
    "summary": "An interview shot of @p5 sitting in his home, wearing a green sweatshirt. He speaks with a gentle smile and a nostalgic look in his eyes. Another photo shows a nurse's hands holding the infant.",
    "person": [

      "Steve Hartman"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 235.758,
    "end_time": 257.653,
    "summary": "The exterior of the South Bend Police Department building is shown with several flags flying in the breeze. @p2 stands in front of the building, wearing a grey jacket over a green plaid shirt, and speaks to the camera.     "person": [
      "Steve Hartman",
      "Gene Eister"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 257.653,
    "end_time": 270.133,

    "person": [

    ]

A close-up shot shows his uniform shoulder patch, which reads [SOUTH BEND POLICE INDIANA] and [EST 1903].",
    "person": [
      "Matthew Hegedus-Stewart"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 289.018,
    "end_time": 303.499,

    "person": [
      "Matthew Hegedus-Stewart",
      "Steve Hartman",
      "Gene Eister"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 303.499,
    "end_time": 322.451,

They are both smiling and engaged in an animated conversation. The room has neutral-colored walls and several plaques.",
    "person": [
      "Gene Eister",
      "Matthew Hegedus-Stewart"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 322.451,
    "end_time": 339.168,
    "summary": "A close-up of @p5's face as he speaks, his expression one of deep reflection.     "person": [
      "Gene Eister",
      "Matthew Hegedus-Stewart"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 339.168,
    "end_time": 344.5,
    "summary": "A still photograph shows @p6 and @p5 standing side-by-side, both smiling broadly at the camera. @p6 is in his police uniform, and @p5 is in his Notre Dame sweatshirt. They are in a police station hallway. A lower-third graphic reads [STEVE HARTMAN On the Road IN SOUTH BEND, INDIANA].",
    "person": [
      "Matthew Hegedus-Stewart",
      "Gene Eister"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 344.5,
    "end_time": 357.914,
    "summary": "In the news studio, @p1 is now wearing a dark navy blue suit. She stands center-frame. To her left, an OTS graphic shows a man's portrait. To her right, three graphics show: an elderly woman's face, an elderly woman leaning over, and a close-up of a white egg with writing on it. The top right corner text says [OCT. 6, 2023]. The program logo [On the Road WITH STEVE HARTMAN] is on a screen to her left.",
    "person": [
      "Norah O'Donnell"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 357.914,
    "end_time": 374.363,
    "summary": "A black antique Ford Model T car drives slowly out of a residential driveway. @p7, a middle-aged man with short grey hair and a beard, is at the steering wheel, smiling. Inside his home, @p7 shows off his collection of antiques, including an old record player that is spinning a black disc and a vintage white refrigerator with a curved design. He walks through his kitchen, which is decorated with retro items.",
    "person": [
      "John Amalfitano"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 374.363,
    "end_time": 387.777,
    "summary": "In an interview, @p7 sits in his living room, wearing a dark blue t-shirt. He speaks with a warm and engaged expression. He stands in front of a wooden cabinet filled with porcelain figurines and tea sets. He opens the glass door and carefully retrieves a small silver egg cup that holds a white chicken egg. He holds it up to show it to the camera.",
    "person": [
      "John Amalfitano"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 387.777,
    "end_time": 400.856,
    "summary": "An extreme close-up of the chicken egg reveals handwritten text in blue ink: [April 2, 1951 Whoever gets this egg please write Miss Mary Foss Forest City Iowa]. @p7 holds the egg with great care, slowly rotating it between his fingers to display the entire message. The egg appears aged, with some light brown speckles on the shell.",
    "person": [
      "John Amalfitano"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 400.856,
    "end_time": 416.572,
    "summary": "@p7 stands in his dining room, holding the egg and talking about it. A Facebook page for the group [Weird (and wonderful) Secondhand Finds That Just Need To Be Shared] is shown. A post by John Amalfitano from August 17 shows photos of the egg and its message. One part of the post's text is highlighted: [Wonder if she might still be alive!].",
    "person": [
      "John Amalfitano"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 416.572,
    "end_time": 423.456,
    "summary": "@p2 stands in a wooded area with trees displaying autumn foliage. He is wearing a dark grey shirt and is speaking directly to the camera, using his hands to gesture. This transitions to an interview shot of @p8, an elderly woman with curly white hair and glasses. She is sitting in her home, wearing a tan zip-up sweater. She looks thoughtful as she speaks with @p2.",
    "person": [
      "Steve Hartman",
      "Mary Foss"
    ]
  }
]

User prompt + generated schema

Identify every significant shot change and output the resulting segments, using the supplied cast information.

People appearing in this video:
- Opal Lee: Interviewee. the elderly short grey hair short woman

}

    "entity": []

    "start_time": 387.777,

    "entity": []

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Identify every significant shot change and output the resulting segments, using the supplied cast information.

People appearing in this video:
- Opal Lee: Interviewee. the elderly short grey hair short woman

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Detailed visual caption covering people, actions, setting, camera work, and OCR text (in [brackets])."
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the main characters in this segment",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Name people by full name when known; otherwise label by appearance index (e.g. `man_1`, `woman_1`) alongside a description."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

    "description": "A celebration is taking place on the porch of a new grey house. age Yeager, now wearing a yellow baseball cap and a checked shirt, stands with a microphone, talking to Opal Lee. Several people are gathered behind them, clapping and smiling.",

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/9e18746a/9e18746a_chunk1.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 51285,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "asr_data",
    "segment_count": 70
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below.\n\nPeople appearing in this video:\n- Jesse Weber: Studio anchor. the short dark hair short man\n\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the central people featured in this segment",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Jesse Weber (Studio anchor)
- Michael Virgil (Victim (mentioned))
- Connie Aguilar (Fiancée (mentioned))
- Rebecca Park (Victim (mentioned))
- d4vd (Singer (mentioned))
- Richard Shoenstein (Trial Lawyer)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Cut this video into shots and, for each shot, describe it using the people information given below.

People appearing in this video:
- Jesse Weber: Studio anchor. the short dark hair short man

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the central people featured in this segment",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/6b963c60/6b963c60_chunk1.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 61873,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided.\n\nPeople appearing in this video:\n- Matty Demaret (Young): Protagonist as a child. the young has dark hair child\n- Teddy Deserve: Mentor figure. the grey hair man\n- Bobby Boulevard: Victim. the middle-aged curly dark hair man\n- Matty Demaret: Lead protagonist. the styled dark hair short man\n- Mr. McCreadle: Potential employer. the with grey hair man\n- Benny Chains: Matty's Father. the grey hair man\n- the a man: Supporting character. the a man\n- Chris Scarpa: Matty's associate. the short dark hair short man\n- Johnny Marbles: The pilot. the curly dark hair man\n- Taylor Reese: Muscle/enforcer. the bald muscular man\n\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": [
                {
                  "name": "name",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                },
                {
                  "name": "description",
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Benny Chains (Matty's Father)
- Matty Demaret (Young) (Protagonist as a child)
- Teddy Deserve (Mentor figure)
- Bobby Boulevard (Victim)
- Donnie (Supporting character)
- Matty Demaret (Lead protagonist)
- Mr. McCreadle (Potential employer)
- Chris Scarpa (Matty's associate)
- Johnny Marbles (The pilot)
- Taylor Reese (Muscle/enforcer)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

The object, which resembles a stylized film reel box, rotates slowly in 3D space. As it centers itself, beams of light radiate from the corners, creating a dramatic halo effect.",

  },

  },

  },

    "summary": "@p2 and @p1 walk towards a metal door with a sign that reads [RISTORANTE VESUVIO]. @p2 stops and turns to face @p1, placing his hands firmly on the boy's shoulders. @p2 is leaning in close, his expression serious and intense as he speaks. @p1 looks up at him with a mix of apprehension and determination, his small frame dwarfed by @p2.",

    "start_time": 130.0,

The camera cuts back to @p1, who listens intently, his lips pressed together. The lighting is harsh, casting deep shadows across their faces in the dark alley.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 142.976,
    "end_time": 160.0,
    "summary": "They enter the building through the rear door. The scene shifts to the interior of a restaurant's kitchen, filled with stainless steel tables, hanging pots, and stacks of white bowls. Credits continue to appear on screen: [CASTING BY LAUREL SMITH], [COSTUME DESIGNER BETH PASTERNAK], and [MUSIC SUPERVISOR AMANDA DEMME]. @p2 leads the way, followed by @p1.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 160.0,
    "end_time": 184.225,
    "summary": "The group moves from the kitchen into the main dining area of the restaurant, which is currently closed and dimly lit. Chairs are stacked upside down on the tables. They walk past framed pictures on the wall and towards a doorway at the back. Credits for [MUSIC COMPOSED BY CLINT MANSELL], [EDITED BY DAVID MORITZ], and [PRODUCTION DESIGNER LESTER COHEN] fade in and out.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 184.225,
    "end_time": 195.0,
    "summary": "They descend a set of stairs into a cluttered basement room. In the center of the room, @p3 is bound to a wooden chair with thick ropes. He wears a light blue shirt and a tan vest. His face is bruised, and he looks up with a terrified expression as @p2, @p1, and @p6 enter his field of vision.",
    "person": [
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 195.0,
    "end_time": 209.0,
    "summary": "@p3 pleads with @p2, who stands with his arms crossed, watching him coldly. @p1 stands slightly behind @p2, his eyes wide as he recognizes the man in the chair. The basement is lit by a single flickering fluorescent light, casting long, dramatic shadows against the concrete walls. On-screen text reads [DIRECTOR OF PHOTOGRAPHY TOM RICHMOND] and [CO-PRODUCER JULIE KIRKHAM].",
    "person": [
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 209.0,
    "end_time": 225.0,
    "summary": "@p6 reaches into his jacket and pulls out a white cloth bundle. He unfolds it to reveal a small black revolver and hands it to @p1. The boy takes the weapon with both hands, his fingers trembling slightly as he feels its weight. He looks down at the gun, then back at @p3. Text on screen lists [EXECUTIVE PRODUCERS STAN WLODKOWSKI MICHAEL DE LUCA BRIAN WITTEN].",
    "person": [
      "Benny Chains",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Bobby Boulevard"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 225.0,
    "end_time": 245.0,
    "summary": "@p1 raises the revolver and aims it directly at @p3's head. @p3's eyes are fixed on the barrel of the gun, and he begins to talk rapidly, a forced smile appearing on his face as he tries to appeal to the boy. @p2 watches from the side, his face impassive. @p6 stands by the door, observing the scene.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 245.0,
    "end_time": 258.967,
    "summary": "@p3 becomes more desperate in his speech. Abruptly, @p2 moves forward and grabs @p3's head from behind, while @p7 holds @p3's arms. @p2 roughly shoves his fingers into @p3's mouth to silence him, causing @p3 to gag and struggle. @p1 continues to hold the gun steady, though his expression is one of mounting distress.",
    "person": [
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Donnie",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 258.967,
    "end_time": 275.0,
    "summary": "The camera focuses on @p1's face, capturing the internal conflict visible in his eyes. He is sweating, and his breathing is shallow. The camera then cuts to a close-up of @p3, whose mouth is bloodied from @p2's rough treatment. @p3's eyes are filled with tears as he stares at the young boy.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Teddy Deserve"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 275.0,
    "end_time": 298.0,
    "summary": "@p2 stands behind @p1, whispering into his ear and guiding his hands on the gun. @p1's finger is on the trigger, and he is visibly shaking. He closes one eye to aim, then opens it again, unable to find the resolve to fire. The tension in the room is palpable as everyone waits for him to act.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 298.0,
    "end_time": 315.0,
    "summary": "After a long, silent moment, @p1's resolve breaks. He slowly lowers the revolver, his shoulders slumping. He turns to @p2 and mutters an apology. @p2 lets out a heavy sigh and takes the gun from @p1's hands, placing a comforting hand on the boy's neck. @p1 looks down at the floor, dejected.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Teddy Deserve"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 315.0,
    "end_time": 340.0,
    "summary": "@p2 bends down to look @p1 in the eye, speaking softly to him. He then patts @p1 on the head and gestures for him to leave the room. @p1 turns and slowly walks back towards the basement stairs. @p2 then turns his attention back to the bound @p3, who is still gagging and bleeding from his mouth.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret (Young)",
      "Bobby Boulevard"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 340.0,
    "end_time": 349.807,
    "summary": "@p2 stands over @p3, his expression shifting from empathy for the boy to cold calculation for the man. He delivers a final message to @p3, who nods frantically in understanding. @p7 and @p6 remain in the background, watching the interaction. The camera slowly pans away from the group as the basement door at the top of the stairs closes.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Bobby Boulevard",
      "Donnie",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 349.807,
    "end_time": 365.0,
    "summary": "@p1 exits the restaurant's back door into the alley. The night air is thick with steam. He walks over to a metal ladder attached to the side of the building and then moves towards a wall-mounted payphone. Credits appear on screen: [PRODUCED BY LAWRENCE BENDER] and [BRIAN KOPPELMAN & DAVID LEVIEN].",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 365.0,
    "end_time": 385.802,
    "summary": "@p1 stands at the payphone, holding a coin in his hand but not making a call. He looks lost and uncertain. The camera stays on his face as the lighting gradually changes, and his youthful features dissolve and transform into those of an adult man. Text on the screen reads [WRITTEN AND DIRECTED BY BRIAN KOPPELMAN & DAVID LEVIEN].",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret (Young)"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 385.802,
    "end_time": 405.0,
    "summary": "The transition is complete, revealing @p4 in the present day. He is sitting in a brightly lit, modern office, wearing a sharp dark suit and tie. He has a serious, professional expression as he waits for someone to speak. He is currently in a job interview.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 405.0,
    "end_time": 425.0,
    "summary": "@p5 is sitting across from @p4 behind a large wooden desk. He is wearing a suit and glasses, and he is reviewing a paper document. The office is decorated with sports memorabilia, including footballs and a basketball on the shelves behind him. @p5 looks up from the resume and addresses @p4.",
    "person": [
      "Mr. McCreadle",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 425.0,
    "end_time": 450.0,
    "summary": "@p4 speaks with confidence, leaning forward slightly in his chair. He describes his background and interest in becoming a sports agent. @p5 listens, resting his chin on his hand, his expression skeptical. The camera cuts between the two men as they engage in the interview.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Mr. McCreadle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 450.0,
    "end_time": 480.0,
    "summary": "@p5 continues to go through @p4's resume, reading out various past job titles. He notes that @p4 was the president of several businesses, including [WECOBON PLUMBING] and [WHITE'S TAXI AND LIVERY]. @p4 confirms each one with a nod, trying to maintain a professional demeanor despite @p5's increasingly condescending tone.",
    "person": [
      "Mr. McCreadle",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 480.0,
    "end_time": 505.0,
    "summary": "@p5 points out a specific entry on the resume: [GIANDO'S CATERING HALL]. He looks up at @p4 and asks if he is related to the owner, @p6. @p4 pauses for a moment, his expression hardening slightly, before admitting that @p6 is his father.",
    "person": [
      "Mr. McCreadle",
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 505.0,
    "end_time": 525.0,
    "summary": "@p5's attitude shifts dramatically. He leans back in his chair and lets out a dry laugh, his skepticism turning into open hostility. He begins to pace around the office, gesturing wildly as he accuses @p4 of being a \"knockaround guy\" sent by his father to intimidate him. @p4 remains seated, his jaw clenched.",
    "person": [
      "Mr. McCreadle",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 525.0,
    "end_time": 552.0,
    "summary": "@p4 stands up, trying to defend himself and insisting that he is only there for a legitimate job opportunity. @p5 dismisses him with a wave of his hand, moving towards the door to end the interview. @p4 stands alone in the center of the office for a second, a look of frustration and defeat on his face, before the screen fades to black.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Mr. McCreadle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 552.761,
    "end_time": 555.964,
    "summary": "A high-angle, wide shot establishes the New York City skyline under a bright, clear blue sky. The Twin Towers of the World Trade Center dominate the center-right of the frame, surrounded by numerous other skyscrapers in lower Manhattan. In the foreground, a multi-lane highway is filled with moderate traffic, including several large white semi-trucks and smaller dark-colored sedans moving towards the city. A prominent blue billboard in the middle ground displays a message in white and yellow text that reads [$15 MILLION]",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 555.964,
    "end_time": 561.336,
    "summary": "The camera pans left and zooms in, following a black sedan as it travels along the highway. To the left of the car, a red van is partially visible. The highway is bordered by a concrete barrier and green metal railings, with more traffic visible on overpasses in the background. Mature green trees line the side of the road, and the sunlight creates a clear, sharp look to the scene.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 561.336,
    "end_time": 566.339,
    "summary": "A close-up shot from the side shows @p4 in profile as he drives the black sedan. He is wearing a dark suit jacket, a light blue collared shirt, and dark sunglasses. His expression is neutral but focused on the road ahead. His left hand is visible on the steering wheel, and his dark hair is neatly styled. The background outside the car window is blurred by motion, showing hints of the city skyline.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 566.339,
    "end_time": 572.247,
    "summary": "The scene shifts to an outdoor handball court enclosed by a chain-link fence. @p6, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt and white athletic gloves, is in the middle of a game. The court's surface is concrete with painted yellow lines, and the background shows a park-like setting with trees and a building.",
    "person": [
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 572.247,
    "end_time": 575.85,
    "summary": "A medium shot focuses on @p6 as he reacts to the game, his face showing a mix of exertion and excitement. He has short-cropped grey hair and is sweating slightly. Behind him, @p4 enters the scene through a gate in the chain-link fence. @p4 is still dressed in his dark suit and sunglasses, carrying two white plastic grocery bags from a store called [MANCINI'S]. He walks with a steady pace, observing the ongoing game.",
    "person": [
      "Benny Chains",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 575.85,
    "end_time": 583.691,

Other people are visible in the background, some sitting on benches and others standing, all observing the activity on the court.",

      "Matty Demaret",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {

      "Benny Chains",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 589.497,
    "end_time": 599.507,
    "summary": "The match concludes, and the players begin to walk off the court. A man in a dark suit, @p2, walks towards @p6, smiling and gesturing as if celebrating a victory. @p6 raises his gloved hands in the air, a wide grin on his face. They are joined by another man in a suit, @p7, and they all move towards the area where @p4 is sitting. The atmosphere is jovial and triumphant among the older men.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Benny Chains",
      "Donnie",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 599.507,
    "end_time": 606.781,
    "summary": "A close-up shot shows @p2's teammate, still wearing his blue baseball cap, as he walks towards @p4. He takes a towel from another man and begins to wipe his face. @p4 remains seated on the bench, now holding a white paper cup and taking a sip. The teammate sits down next to @p4, leaning back and relaxing. His blue cap has a small circular logo on the front and an Italian flag on the side.",
    "person": [
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 606.781,
    "end_time": 617.892,
    "summary": "A medium shot captures @p4 and the teammate on the bench, engaged in conversation. The background shows the chain-link fence and cars parked along a distant street.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 617.892,
    "end_time": 625.099,
    "summary": "The camera cuts between close-ups of @p4 and the teammate as they talk. @p4's tone seems slightly defensive, and he gestures with his hands as he speaks. The lighting is bright and direct, casting clear shadows on the ground.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Benny Chains",
      "Teddy Deserve"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 625.099,
    "end_time": 633.774,
    "summary": "Continuing their conversation, @p4 leans slightly towards the teammate, his expression becoming more animated. The focus remains tightly on the two men on the bench, with the rest of the park blurred in the background.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Benny Chains"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 633.774,
    "end_time": 642.616,
    "summary": "A medium shot shows @p4 pulling a large bottle of water from one of the grocery bags and handing it to the teammate. The overall mood is one of a relaxed post-game wind-down.",
    "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Benny Chains",
      "Teddy Deserve"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 642.616,
    "end_time": 650.791,
    "summary": "@p6 and @p2 arrive at the bench and sit down alongside @p4 and the teammate. @p6 begins to unwrap a sandwich, his expression satisfied. @p2 leans back, looking relaxed and content. @p4 continues to talk, looking between the three older men.     "person": [
      "Benny Chains",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 650.791,
    "end_time": 659.667,
    "summary": "A close-up shows @p6 reaching into his pocket and pulling out a thick roll of cash secured with a rubber band.     "person": [
      "Benny Chains",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 659.667,
    "end_time": 667.374,
    "summary": "A medium shot captures the group on the bench, with the teammate putting the money away and continuing to eat his sandwich. @p6 and @p2 are also eating and drinking, their conversation becoming more animated. @p4 continues to speak to them, his posture slightly more formal than the others.     "person": [
      "Benny Chains",
      "Teddy Deserve",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 667.374,

      "Benny Chains",
      "Matty Demaret"
    ]
  },

  },

  {

  },

    "start_time": 805.116,

    "summary": "A wide, low-angle shot shows a small, white and red light aircraft as it approaches a runway for landing.     "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 913.958,
    "end_time": 924.535,
    "summary": "The camera shifts to a medium shot of @p4 and @p8 standing by their black car, which is parked near the runway.     "person": [
      "Matty Demaret",
      "Chris Scarpa"
    ]
  },

    "start_time": 924.535,

      "Johnny Marbles",

    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 960.171,
    "end_time": 973.384,
    "summary": "A sequence of shots follows a black van as it drives through a narrow alleyway with brick walls covered in colorful graffiti.     "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 973.384,
    "end_time": 984.195,
    "summary": "The black van pulls up and parks in front of a small bodega with a yellow and red sign. The driver, @p10, gets out of the van. He is a tall, muscular, bald man wearing a light blue t-shirt and dark pants. He pauses for a moment to look around the street before walking towards the entrance of the store. A white truck and several other cars are parked nearby.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 984.195,
    "end_time": 995.106,
    "summary": "A close-up shot focuses on @p10 as he enters the bodega. He has a serious and determined expression. On his upper left arm, a large black Star of David tattoo is clearly visible. He walks with a steady and purposeful gait, passing by a display of newspapers and snacks. The interior of the bodega is cramped and cluttered, with shelves filled with various products.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 995.106,
    "end_time": 1002.613,
    "summary": "Inside the store, @p10 walks past a counter where a man is talking to the store owner. He ignores them and continues towards the back of the store, where several arcade machines are located. One of the machines is a video poker game called [DOUBLE-UP]. @p10 stops in front of the machine and begins to examine it, his expression still neutral and focused.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1002.613,
    "end_time": 1012.29,
    "summary": "A close-up captures @p10's hands as he uses a key to unlock a metal plate on the front of the arcade machine. He then reaches inside and begins to pull out several stacks of cash. The store owner watches him from behind the counter, his expression one of unease and concern. @p10 is completely focused on his task, his movements efficient and practiced.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1012.29,
    "end_time": 1023.167,
    "summary": "Continuing to collect money from the arcade machines, @p10 moves methodically from one to the next. He has a small leather bag that he is filling with cash. The store owner continues to watch him, his posture stiff and his gaze fixed on @p10. The background of the store is filled with shelves of canned goods and other household products. The lighting is fluorescent and slightly harsh.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1023.167,
    "end_time": 1028.005,
    "summary": "A close-up focuses on @p10 as he finishes collecting the money and locks the arcade machine. He then walks towards the counter, carrying his bag of cash. His expression is now more intense, and he looks directly at the store owner. The owner's expression is one of apprehension as @p10 approaches him. The overall mood is one of tension and impending confrontation.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1028.005,
    "end_time": 1043.187,
    "summary": "A medium shot captures the interaction between @p10 and the store owner at the counter. @p10 leans on the counter, his presence intimidating. He speaks with a low and threatening voice, demanding his share of the money. The store owner tries to explain himself, his gestures nervous and his voice slightly shaky. Behind them, the shelves are filled with colorful packages and containers.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1043.187,
    "end_time": 1053.064,
    "summary": "The camera cuts between close-ups of @p10 and the store owner as their argument escalates. @p10's face becomes more aggressive, his features contorted with anger. The store owner's expression is now one of genuine fear, and he continues to gesture frantically as he speaks. The lighting in the store creates deep shadows on their faces, adding to the dramatic tension of the scene.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1053.064,
    "end_time": 1062.573,
    "summary": "A wider shot shows @p10 suddenly becoming violent. He grabs a heavy metal object from the counter and slams it into the screen of one of the arcade machines, shattering the glass. He then turns to the next machine and does the same. The store owner reacts with a cry of alarm, his hands raised in a gesture of helplessness. Debris and broken glass are scattered on the floor.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1062.573,
    "end_time": 1073.184,
    "summary": "Continuing his destructive rampage, @p10 smashes several more arcade machines, his movements forceful and deliberate. The sound of breaking glass and metal fills the cramped space. The store owner retreats behind the counter, looking on in horror. @p10's expression is one of cold and calculated anger as he systematically destroys the machines. Sparks fly from one of the broken machines.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1073.184,
    "end_time": 1086.364,
    "summary": "A sequence of quick cuts captures the sheer destruction @p10 is causing. He is shown from multiple angles as he strikes the machines with the metal object. Each blow is powerful and results in more damage. The store owner continues to watch, his face pale and his expression one of complete despair. The bodega's interior is now a scene of chaos and devastation.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1086.364,
    "end_time": 1101.327,
    "summary": "After finishing with the machines, @p10 turns his attention back to the store owner. He reaches across the counter and grabs the man by his shirt, pulling him close. He speaks in a low and terrifying whisper, his face inches away from the owner's. The owner is visibly trembling with fear. @p10 finally releases him and walks out of the store, leaving the owner standing alone amidst the wreckage. The scene ends with a final shot of @p10 walking away from the bodega, his expression still dark and determined.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 1101.018,
    "end_time": 1101.351,
    "summary": "A close-up shot focuses on @p10's face, his features contorted in a mask of intense fury as he leans in close to the bodega owner. He speaks with a low, menacing growl, his teeth bared in a snarl. The owner, @p3, is visibly terrified, his eyes wide and his body trembling as he is pressed against the counter by @p10's forceful grip. The lighting is harsh and direct, casting deep shadows on @p10's face and highlighting the raw emotion of the encounter. Abruptly, @p10 releases @p3 and slams several crumpled bills onto the counter with a loud thud, a final gesture of intimidation. He then turns away, his movements sharp and deliberate, and exits the store without a backward glance. The camera follows his exit, capturing the lingering tension in the air and the shattered remains of the bodega behind him.",
    "person": [
      "Taylor Reese",
      "Bobby Boulevard"
    ]
  }
]

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided.

People appearing in this video:
- Matty Demaret (Young): Protagonist as a child. the young has dark hair child
- Teddy Deserve: Mentor figure. the grey hair man
- Bobby Boulevard: Victim. the middle-aged curly dark hair man
- Matty Demaret: Lead protagonist. the styled dark hair short man
- Mr. McCreadle: Potential employer. the with grey hair man
- Benny Chains: Matty's Father. the grey hair man
- the a man: Supporting character. the a man
- Chris Scarpa: Matty's associate. the short dark hair short man
- Johnny Marbles: The pilot. the curly dark hair man
- Taylor Reese: Muscle/enforcer. the bald muscular man

{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided.

People appearing in this video:
- Matty Demaret (Young): Protagonist as a child. the young has dark hair child
- Teddy Deserve: Mentor figure. the grey hair man
- Bobby Boulevard: Victim. the middle-aged curly dark hair man
- Matty Demaret: Lead protagonist. the styled dark hair short man
- Mr. McCreadle: Potential employer. the with grey hair man
- Benny Chains: Matty's Father. the grey hair man
- the a man: Supporting character. the a man
- Chris Scarpa: Matty's associate. the short dark hair short man
- Johnny Marbles: The pilot. the curly dark hair man
- Taylor Reese: Muscle/enforcer. the bald muscular man

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "every person in this segment, however minor",
                "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": [
                        {
                            "name": "name",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Use each person's full name when known; for unnamed people, give a brief appearance phrase as the `name` and elaborate in `description`."
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "description",
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/e78160b4/e78160b4_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 262144,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Break the video into distinct shots by identifying clear visual boundaries—whenever there is a meaningful shot change (for example, a cut, a major camera angle shift, a significant framing change, or any transition that clearly marks a new segment). Begin a new segment at each of these significant shot changes, using only the information provided about what happens in the video. As you segment, keep the listed people and their roles in mind so that the appropriate segments correspond to the correct on-screen subjects: Lindsay Davis (Anchor, the dark hair woman), the long dark hair woman (Reporter, the long dark hair woman), the short dark hair short man (Senator, the short dark hair short man), the short gray hair short man (Chief Foreign Correspondent, the short gray hair short man), the man (Supreme Leader of Iran, the man), Andre Bell (College Student, the short dark hair short man), and Drake Maye (Quarterback, the light brown hair short man). Ensure that no segment has a duration shorter than 0 seconds.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
          {
            "name": "start_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "end_time",
            "type": "number",
            "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
          },
          {
            "name": "description",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "Full visual description including subjects, actions, place, cinematography, and OCR of any text in [brackets]."
          },
          {
            "name": "entity",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "all people in this segment, including background figures. Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, describe their appearance instead.",
            "items_type": "string"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Lindsay Davis (Anchor)
- Ali Khamenei (Supreme Leader of Iran)
- Selina Wang (Reporter)
- Mark Warner (Senator)
- Ian Pannell (Chief Foreign Correspondent)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 15.0,
    "summary": "A medium shot of anchor @p1 in a news studio, looking directly at the camera with a serious expression. She is a Black woman with dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a maroon blazer. Behind her is a large screen displaying the program logo and a map of the United States with weather patterns. At the bottom of the screen, a white banner with a blue logo reads [abc WORLD NEWS TONIGHT].",
    "person": [
      "Lindsay Davis"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 15.0,
    "end_time": 33.0,

A green sign for Florida is shown with snow on the ground, reading [WELCOME TO THE FREE STATE OF FLORIDA THE SUNSHINE STATE Governor Ron DeSantis]. People are seen bundled in winter coats walking through a snowy neighborhood. A red banner at the bottom of the screen reads [01.18.26 BREAKING NEWS @WORLDNEWSTONIGHT] and [50M+ BRACING FOR SNOW & BITTER COLD].",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 33.0,

Protesters are seen in the snow holding signs, followed by a clip of @p6 speaking at an outdoor podium during the day. Night footage shows tactical teams in the streets with smoke or tear gas rising in the background. A banner at the bottom reads [DEFENSE OFFICIALS: 1500 ARMY TROOPS ON STANDBY] and [01.18.26 @WORLDNEWSTONIGHT].",

      "Ali Khamenei"
    ]

  },

  },

  {

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Divide the video into shots, starting a new segment at every significant shot change, using the details provided.

People appearing in this video:
- Lindsay Davis: Anchor. the dark hair woman
- the long dark hair woman: Reporter. the long dark hair woman
- the short dark hair short man: Senator. the short dark hair short man
- the short gray hair short man: Chief Foreign Correspondent. the short gray hair short man
- the man: Supreme Leader of Iran. the man
- Andre Bell: College Student. the short dark hair short man
- Drake Maye: Quarterback. the light brown hair short man

```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Full visual description including subjects, actions, place, cinematography, and OCR of any text in [brackets]."
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "all people in this segment, including background figures. Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, describe their appearance instead.",
                "items_type": "string"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Break the video into distinct shots by identifying clear visual boundaries—whenever there is a meaningful shot change (for example, a cut, a major camera angle shift, a significant framing change, or any transition that clearly marks a new segment). Begin a new segment at each of these significant shot changes, using only the information provided about what happens in the video. As you segment, keep the listed people and their roles in mind so that the appropriate segments correspond to the correct on-screen subjects: Lindsay Davis (Anchor, the dark hair woman), the long dark hair woman (Reporter, the long dark hair woman), the short dark hair short man (Senator, the short dark hair short man), the short gray hair short man (Chief Foreign Correspondent, the short gray hair short man), the man (Supreme Leader of Iran, the man), Andre Bell (College Student, the short dark hair short man), and Drake Maye (Quarterback, the light brown hair short man). Ensure that no segment has a duration shorter than 0 seconds.
```json
{
    "type": "array",
    "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": [
            {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the segment, seconds"
            },
            {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Full visual description including subjects, actions, place, cinematography, and OCR of any text in [brackets]."
            },
            {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "all people in this segment, including background figures. Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, describe their appearance instead.",
                "items_type": "string"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

A banner at the bottom identifies him as [JEFF SMITH METEOROLOGIST, WABC-TV NEW YORK].",
    "entity": [
      "Lindsay Davis",
      "the short dark hair short man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 262.0,
    "end_time": 268.0,
    "description": "Meteorologist the short dark hair short man is shown in a full medium shot outdoors at night, with snow visibly falling and accumulating on his shoulders. He is gesturing as he speaks. The city lights of New York are blurred in the background. A blue banner at the bottom left reads [LIVE ET JEFF SMITH METEOROLOGIST, WABC-TV NEW YORK].",
    "entity": [
      "the short dark hair short man"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 268.0,
    "end_time": 287.0,
    "description": "A weather graphic titled [MULTIPLE WINTER STORMS RADAR LOOP] shows storm patterns across the eastern half of the United States, with red areas indicating rain and blue areas for snow. This transitions to a map of [STORM ALERTS RIGHT NOW] with regions color-coded for [BLIZZARD WARNING], [WINTER STORM WARNING], and [WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY]. Visible cities on the map include [Milwaukee], [Grand Rapids], [Buffalo], [New York], and [Philadelphia].",
    "entity": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 287.0,
    "end_time": 302.0,
    "description": "A [STORM TRACK] graphic shows the predicted movement of the weather system from Sunday evening into Monday morning. This is followed by a [SNOW POTENTIAL THROUGH MONDAY AM] map, highlighting areas expected to receive different amounts of snow, labeled as [SNOW: 3'-6\"], [SNOW: 1'-3\"], and [SNOW: <1\"]. Cities like [Grand Rapids], [Indianapolis], and [New York] are marked.",
    "entity": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 302.0,
    "end_time": 312.944,
    "description": "An [ARCTIC BLAST] graphic shows a map with cold air moving down from Canada into the northern and central U.S. A table lists [EARLY WEEK WIND CHILLS] for various cities from Monday to Wednesday. Values include [-19] for [MINNEAPOLIS] and [-13] for [CHICAGO] on Monday, and [8] for [NEW YORK] on Tuesday.",
    "entity": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 312.944,
    "end_time": 333.633,
    "description": "Anchor Lindsay Davis is in the studio, standing next to a screen displaying a graphic about Minneapolis troops. The graphic reads [DEFENSE OFFICIALS: 1500 ARMY TROOPS ON STANDBY]. Below Lindsay Davis, a banner shows footage of protesters holding signs, with one sign reading [POSTAL WORKERS DEMAND ICE OUT OF MN! JUSTICE FOR RENEE GOOD].",
    "entity": [
      "Lindsay Davis"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 333.633,
    "end_time": 344.0,
    "description": "Archive footage shows a line of soldiers in winter gear and yellow parachutes boarding a large military transport plane at sunset. This is followed by an aerial shot of several paratroopers with white parachutes floating down toward a snowy landscape. A banner at the bottom reads [BREAKING NEWS DEFENSE OFFICIALS: 1500 ARMY TROOPS ON STANDBY TWO BATTALIONS PREPARE FOR POSSIBLE DEPLOYMENT IN MINNESOTA]. Credit to [File / DVIDS] is visible.",
    "entity": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 344.0,
    "end_time": 353.0,
    "description": "Footage shows a large crowd of people marching through a snowy Minneapolis street during the day, holding signs and chanting. A clip shows a woman sitting in a car, looking through the driver's side window. Text in the upper left indicates [January 7] and the program hashtag [#WORLDNEWSTONIGHT] is at the bottom right.",
    "entity": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 353.0,
    "end_time": 353.22,
    "description": "A profile shot of President Trump is shown, followed by footage of a line of paratroopers walking toward a large Chinook helicopter in a snowy area with mountains. A banner at the bottom reads [DEFENSE OFFICIALS: TRUMP HAS NOT MADE FINAL DECISION ON DEPLOYMENT]. On-screen text reads [Taking ...prudent steps to prepare...] and credits [File Photo: DVIDS].",
    "entity": []
  }
]

Row metadata and decisions

{
  "domain": "news",
  "source_dataset": "tl_dense_caption_v1_1",
  "media_path": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/3a8b34f6/3a8b34f6_chunk0.mp4",
  "chunk_start": 0.0,
  "chunk_end": 681.013667,
  "entity_sme_render": {
    "output_structure": "consolidated",
    "mode": "audio_encoder",
    "asr_source": "gemini",
    "representation": "object",
    "naming_fallback": "described",
    "entity_count": "main",
    "roster_tier": "main",
    "summary": false,
    "roster_exposure": "partial"
  },
  "segment_instruction_rule": {
    "segment_count": {
      "variant": "exact",
      "value": 18
    }
  },
  "shot_names_missing_from_roster": []
}

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/3a8b34f6/3a8b34f6_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 171620,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Watch and analyze the entire video end-to-end as a single continuous segment (do not divide it into multiple parts or sections). Then, produce one consolidated record that includes (1) the full roster and (2) a complete shot breakdown derived from the video. The output must contain exactly 18 segments—no more and no fewer.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "only the lead/principal people in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Donald Trump (Former US President)
- Volodymyr Zelenskyy (Ukrainian President)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

    "summary": "Wide static shot of two men standing at speaking stands in a formal setting. On the right, @p1 stands behind a dark wooden lectern bearing the seal of the President of the United States. To his left, @p2 stands at an identical station, looking down at some papers. Behind them are three flags: the Ukrainian flag in the center, flanked by American flags on the left and right, against a dark navy curtain. Graphics at the top left indicate the location is [MAR-A-LAGO PALM BEACH, FL] and the time is [4:50 PM ET] under a [LIVE] tag. The bottom left features the [FOX NEWS channel] logo, and a small center graphic reads [FOX REPORT].",

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Analyze this video in its entirety as one segment (do not split it into parts); output a single record containing the roster and the shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "only the lead/principal people in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Watch and analyze the entire video end-to-end as a single continuous segment (do not divide it into multiple parts or sections). Then, produce one consolidated record that includes (1) the full roster and (2) a complete shot breakdown derived from the video. The output must contain exactly 18 segments—no more and no fewer.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Temporally segment the video at significant shot changes. The people below may help you. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "only the lead/principal people in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

  {
    "type": "video",

      "type": "object",

        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",

            "type": "object",

                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
              },

                "name": "description",

                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }

          }
        },
