          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Pat McMonigle (Former FBI Special Agent)
- Juju Chang (Narrator)
- Shariar (Suspect (White Tiger))
- Colby Taylor (Father of Jay Taylor)
- Leslie Taylor (Mother of Jay Taylor)
- Pierre Thomas (ABC's Chief Justice Correspondent)
- Baron Martin (Alleged 764 member)
- Carin Duryee (Former Assistant U.S. Attorney, Arizona)
- Mark Warner (Senator (D) Virginia)
- Chuck Schumer (Senator (D) New York)
- Marsha Blackburn (Senator (R) Tennessee)
- Matt Kriner (Executive Director, Institute for Countering Digital Extremism)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 6.823,
    "summary": "A high-angle drone shot reveals an expansive suburban landscape with numerous green trees and residential houses, bordering a large body of water. The camera smoothly transitions to a ground-level view of a peaceful harbor, where several white sailboats and yachts are docked at wooden piers. Dense evergreen forests cover the rolling hills in the background under a soft, diffused light. The [NIGHTLINE] logo remains in the lower-right corner throughout.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 6.823,
    "end_time": 11.327,
    "summary": "A close-up shot focuses on @p9 during an interview in a quiet indoor setting. He has short, styled dark hair and a well-groomed beard, wearing a light blue button-down shirt. His expression is serious and thoughtful as he gazes slightly away from the camera. The background is softly out of focus, showing a dark room with a few warm highlights. The white and blue [NIGHTLINE] logo is visible in the bottom-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Pat McMonigle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 11.327,
    "end_time": 17.834,
    "summary": "The scene shifts to a close-up of @p9's hands firmly gripping the steering wheel of a vehicle while driving. This is followed by a shot reflected in the car's rearview mirror, showing @p9 wearing dark aviator-style sunglasses. He is focused on the road ahead, with glimpses of suburban trees and a cloudy sky visible through the windows. The [NIGHTLINE] logo persists in its lower-right position.",
    "person": [
      "Pat McMonigle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 17.834,
    "end_time": 24.715,
    "summary": "Returning to the interview, a medium shot shows @p9 speaking with a somber and concentrated expression. A lower-third graphic appears on the left side, with a black background and white text that reads [Pat McMonigle] [Former FBI Special Agent]. The background remains a dimly lit interior. The white and blue [NIGHTLINE] logo continues to be shown in the lower-right corner of the frame.",
    "person": [
      "Pat McMonigle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 24.715,
    "end_time": 36.813,
    "summary": "A stunning high-angle aerial shot provides a view of a European city's urban layout, featuring a mix of modern and traditional buildings. A wide street lined with trees runs through the center, and a passenger train is seen traveling on an elevated track alongside a canal. Large, bold white text is superimposed in the center of the frame: [HAMBURG] [GERMANY]. The [NIGHTLINE] logo is still present in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 36.813,
    "end_time": 45.405,
    "summary": "The video uses quick cuts between @p9 and @p1 during their seated interview. @p9 is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. @p1 is shown listening intently, her expression serious. The interview takes place in a comfortable, dimly lit room with a dark background. The white and blue [NIGHTLINE] logo remains in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Pat McMonigle",
      "Juju Chang"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 45.405,
    "end_time": 63.696,
    "summary": "Further shots from the interview continue to alternate between @p9 and @p1. @p9 leans forward slightly as he speaks, his face showing a mix of concern and determination. @p1 maintains her focused and attentive posture. The lighting is soft and warm, highlighting their faces against the darker background. The [NIGHTLINE] logo is consistently displayed in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Pat McMonigle",
      "Juju Chang"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 63.696,
    "end_time": 68.159,
    "summary": "A vertical still photograph of a young man, @p10, is presented. He is wearing a light gray suit jacket over a black shirt and glasses. His eyes are obscured by a thick black bar for privacy. The word [BILD] is visible in white letters in the upper-left corner of the photo. The overall frame has a dark, textured background. The [NIGHTLINE] logo is still in the bottom-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Shariar"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 68.159,
    "end_time": 72.789,
    "summary": "A slide from a German presentation titled [GRUPPIERUNG 764] is shown. It contains several bullet points in German text. On the right side of the slide, there is an image of a white tiger's head against a dark background with red accents. The entire slide is set within a dark frame. The [NIGHTLINE] logo remains in its position in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 72.789,
    "end_time": 77.835,
    "summary": "An extreme close-up shot focuses on a black computer keyboard. The keys are backlit with a vibrant, glowing red light. The camera slowly and smoothly pans across the keyboard, highlighting the individual keys and the red illumination in a dark environment. The white and blue [NIGHTLINE] logo is visible in the lower-right corner of the frame.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 77.835,
    "end_time": 89.724,
    "summary": "The interview sequence continues with rapid cuts between @p1 and @p9. @p1 is shown speaking directly to @p9, her expression grave. @p9 responds with a serious nod and continues his explanation. The setting remains the same dimly lit, indoor room with soft lighting. The white and blue [NIGHTLINE] logo is shown in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Juju Chang",
      "Pat McMonigle"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 89.724,
    "end_time": 92.81,
    "summary": "A close-up shot features @p2 during an interview in a different indoor location. He has white hair and a matching beard, and he is wearing a blue sweater over a white collared shirt. He is speaking with a somber and pained expression, looking slightly to the side. The background is softly blurred, showing a domestic interior. The [NIGHTLINE] logo is in the bottom-right corner.",
    "person": [
      "Colby Taylor"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 92.81,
    "end_time": 98.107,
    "summary": "The camera captures a wide shot of a large, modern government building with a glass and concrete facade. In the foreground, a gray concrete sign clearly reads [UNITED STATES COURTHOUSE]. The camera slowly tilts upward to show the full height of the building under a overcast sky. Some green trees are visible at the base of the structure. The [NIGHTLINE] logo is in the lower-right corner.",
    "person": []
  },

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Treat the entire video as a single segment and analyze it as a whole: produce one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Consider the whole video as one segment and evaluate it in its entirety: generate a single record that includes the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Name each person by their full name; if a name can't be established, use a concise appearance label for `name`, with the richer description alongside."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the significant people in this segment (leads and supporting); refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

        {
          "name": "the short red hair short woman",
          "description": "Short red hair, wearing a black leather jacket and a maroon dress."
        },
        {
          "name": "Pierre Thomas",
          "description": "Short black hair, wearing a gray suit with a blue tie."
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "start_time": 538.809,
      "end_time": 542.382,
      "description": "A close-up shot features the short red hair short woman as she speaks directly to the camera, delivering the final sign-off for this special edition of Nightline. She has a calm and professional expression. The background is a beautifully lit nighttime cityscape through the studio window. The [NIGHTLINE] logo remains in its usual position in the bottom-right corner as the screen fades to black.",
      "entity": [
        {
          "name": "the short red hair short woman",
          "description": "Short red hair, wearing a black leather jacket and a maroon dress."
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/ea8836ad/ea8836ad_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 150958,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Treat the entire video as a single segment and generate one unified analysis: include the roster of people and the per-shot details.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Ali Rogan (Anchor)
- Donald Trump (US President)
- Delcy Rodriguez (Venezuelan President)
- Mary Triny Mena (Reporter)
- Nick Schifrin (Narrator)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 2.0,
    "summary": "The program opens with a blue textured background featuring words like [TRUSTED], [INQUISITIVE], and [INNOVATIVE] in varying shades of blue. White panels with blue diagonal stripes slide across the screen.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 2.0,
    "end_time": 4.25,
    "summary": "The [PBS NEWS WEEKEND] logo appears in white and blue against a light grey background with diagonal stripes on the right.",
    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 4.25,
    "end_time": 6.5,

    "person": [
      "Ali Rogan"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 6.5,
    "end_time": 11.75,

    "person": []
  },
  {
    "start_time": 11.75,
    "end_time": 14.25,

  },
  {
    "start_time": 14.25,
    "end_time": 22.5,

    "person": []
  },

    "start_time": 22.5,
    "end_time": 32.0,
    "summary": "Field footage from Alaska shows a snowy landscape and small colorful houses. @p7, wearing a red hat and black jacket, stands by a small white plane. The title [Counting Alaska] is displayed.",

      "the red-bearded man in a black jacket"
    ]

    ]
  },

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Consider the whole video as one segment and produce one consolidated analysis: the roster of people and the per-shot detail.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Treat the entire video as a single segment and generate one unified analysis: include the roster of people and the per-shot details.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Segment the video by shot changes and describe what happens in each, referencing the people provided. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Describe the people, their actions, the location, the camera movement, and any text shown on screen [in brackets]."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "the notable people in this segment, both main and supporting; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

Final augmented assistant target

  "domain": "news",

Final user content shape

[
  {
    "type": "video",
    "video": "s3://tl-pegasus-data/raw_media/private/dense_caption_visual/e46e3a96/e46e3a96_chunk0.mp4",
    "sampling": {
      "max_pixels": 64605,
      "min_pixels": 50176
    }
  },
  {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Consider the full video as one continuous unit rather than splitting it into multiple parts, and evaluate it in its entirety. Using that holistic approach, generate a single consolidated output record that includes the complete cast roster, followed by a detailed shot-by-shot breakdown that describes each shot sequentially across the whole video.\n"
  },
  {
    "type": "json_schema",
    "json_schema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": [
        {
          "name": "roster",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "name",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
              },
              {
                "name": "description",
                "type": "string",
                "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
              }
            ]
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shot",
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Detect each significant shot change and produce one segment per shot, referring to the people listed below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": [
              {
                "name": "start_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "end_time",
                "type": "number",
                "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
              },
              {
                "name": "entity",
                "type": "array",
                "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": [
                    {
                      "name": "name",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "description",
                      "type": "string",
                      "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
]

1. Source TDF row

User prompt

Temporally segment this video by shot; for each segment give a summary and the person(s) present.

Cast roster:
- Pete Aguilar (Chairman, House Democratic Caucus)
- Ted Lieu (Vice Chair, House Democratic Caucus)
- Jason Crow (U.S. Representative from Colorado)
- Maggie Goodlander (U.S. Representative from New Hampshire)
- Derek Tran (U.S. Representative from California)

Example output structure:
```json
[
    {
        "start_time": 0.0,
        "end_time": 0.0,
        "summary": "...",
        "person": [
            "..."
        ]
    }
]```

Assistant target

[
  {
    "start_time": 0.0,
    "end_time": 12.56,
    "summary": "A medium shot captures @p1 standing at a formal wooden podium, addressing an unseen audience. He is dressed in a charcoal grey suit paired with a yellow and white striped tie, looking down at his prepared notes. Behind him to the right stands @p2 in a dark suit, while several United States and House Democratic Caucus flags line the background. The podium features a circular gold seal that reads [U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES]. A blue [PBS NEWS] logo is positioned in the lower-left corner of the frame.",
    "person": [
      "Pete Aguilar",
      "Ted Lieu"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 12.56,
    "end_time": 25.84,
    "summary": "@p1 looks up from his notes to speak directly into the microphones, his expression serious and focused. He gestures slightly with his right hand as he emphasizes his points about the current political landscape. In the background, @p2 remains stationary with a neutral expression, listening intently. The bright indoor lighting casts a slight sheen on the polished wood of the lectern and the vibrant colors of the surrounding flags.",
    "person": [
      "Pete Aguilar",
      "Ted Lieu"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 25.84,
    "end_time": 42.12,

The camera remains steady, providing a clear view of his face and upper body. The blue flag behind him prominently displays a portion of its gold seal, though the text on it is partially obscured by the speaker. @p2 shifts his weight slightly but continues to gaze forward from his position behind the chairman.",
    "person": [
      "Pete Aguilar",
      "Ted Lieu"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 42.12,
    "end_time": 65.45,

      "Ted Lieu"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 95.88,

  {
    "start_time": 662.4,
    "end_time": 684.3,
    "summary": "Continuing her address, @p4's tone becomes more emphatic as she discusses the difficult choices families must make. Her eyes scan the room, engaging with the audience and underscoring the universal nature of the challenges she describes. She uses her hands to count off the various financial burdens, such as rent and healthcare, making her points clear and accessible. Behind her, @p3 adjusts his position slightly, his gaze fixed on @p4 as she speaks. The red, white, and blue color palette of the scene is reinforced by the flags and the speakers' attire.",
    "person": [
      "Maggie Goodlander",
      "Jason Crow"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 684.3,
    "end_time": 704.2,
    "summary": "@p4 calls for a vote on the bipartisan war powers resolution, her voice sounding resolute and authoritative. She stands with a poised, upright posture, her hands coming together in front of her as she makes her final appeal. The camera angle is slightly from below, giving her a more commanding presence on the screen. To her left, @p2 remains a steady, supportive figure, his expression mirroring the seriousness of the discussion. The flags in the background provide a sense of historical and institutional weight to her words.",
    "person": [
      "Maggie Goodlander",
      "Ted Lieu"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 704.2,
    "end_time": 718.817,
    "summary": "@p4 concludes her remarks and begins to introduce her colleague, her expression shifting to one of collegiality. She turns her head slightly towards @p5, who is moving into the frame from the right. Her hands reach for a small piece of paper on the podium, which she glances at briefly before continuing. @p5, wearing a dark blue suit and grey patterned tie, prepares to take her place at the microphones. The transition is smooth and professional, indicating a well-organized press event.",
    "person": [
      "Maggie Goodlander",
      "Derek Tran"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 718.817,
    "end_time": 744.2,
    "summary": "@p5 steps up to the podium, adjusting the microphones as he begins his address. He has a calm, confident demeanor, his gaze directed at the press corps as he introduces himself. @p4 steps back and to the side, joining @p2 and @p3 in the background, where they continue to watch attentively. The camera shifts its focus to @p5, who is now the central figure in the frame. He holds a set of notes in his hands, which he consults occasionally as he speaks. The [PBS NEWS] logo is visible in the lower-left corner of the screen.",
    "person": [
      "Derek Tran",
      "Maggie Goodlander",
      "Ted Lieu",
      "Jason Crow"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 744.2,
    "end_time": 774.6,
    "summary": "@p5 criticizes the unilateral military action in Venezuela, his expression becoming more serious and focused. He uses measured hand gestures to emphasize his points, his posture remaining upright and formal. The camera remains in a medium-close shot, capturing the details of his dark suit and the subtle patterns of his tie. Behind him, the flags and the figures of his colleagues provide a consistent backdrop for the press conference. The lighting remains bright, highlighting the determination in @p5's expression as he speaks.",
    "person": [
      "Derek Tran"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 774.6,
    "end_time": 805.6,
    "summary": "As @p5 discusses his service as an Army veteran, his tone carries a sense of personal conviction and experience. He looks directly into the camera, his eyes conveying a message of sincerity and public duty. His hands move in a rhythmic motion, underscoring the importance of the trust between the president and the military. @p4, @p2, and @p3 remain visible in the background, their presence a silent show of unity and support for his message. The overall atmosphere is one of professional gravity and shared purpose.",
    "person": [
      "Derek Tran",
      "Maggie Goodlander",
      "Ted Lieu",
      "Jason Crow"
    ]
  },
  {
    "start_time": 805.6,
    "end_time": 809.008,
    "summary": "@p5 concludes his speech by emphasizing the domestic struggles of families in his district. He speaks with a clear, steady voice, his hands resting on the podium as he makes his final points. His expression is one of concern for his constituents, his gaze scanning the room as if to include everyone in his message. As he finishes, he steps back from the microphones, and @p1 moves forward to take his place. The camera captures the smooth transition between speakers, maintaining the formal flow of the press conference.",
    "person": [
      "Derek Tran",
      "Pete Aguilar"
    ]
  }
]

2. After entity_sme_render

User prompt + generated schema

Treat the entire video as a single segment and analyze it as a whole: produce one record with the cast roster and a shot-by-shot breakdown.

```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Detect each significant shot change and produce one segment per shot, referring to the people listed below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```

3. After replace-mode LLM augmentations

Final augmented user prompt

Consider the full video as one continuous unit rather than splitting it into multiple parts, and evaluate it in its entirety. Using that holistic approach, generate a single consolidated output record that includes the complete cast roster, followed by a detailed shot-by-shot breakdown that describes each shot sequentially across the whole video.
```json
{
    "type": "object",
    "properties": [
        {
            "name": "roster",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "the cast — the main people in this video, one entry each, no duplicates",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "name",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "Refer to each person by their full name; when a person has no established name, put a short appearance label in `name` and the fuller detail in `description`."
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "description",
                        "type": "string",
                        "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "name": "shot",
            "type": "array",
            "description": "Detect each significant shot change and produce one segment per shot, referring to the people listed below. — contiguous, covering the video end to end",
            "items": {
                "type": "object",
                "properties": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "start of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_time",
                        "type": "number",
                        "description": "end of the shot, seconds"
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "entity",
                        "type": "array",
                        "description": "everyone who appears in this segment; refer to each by the exact `name` used in the roster",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object",
                            "properties": [
                                {
                                    "name": "name",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "the exact `name` this person has in the roster"
                                },
                                {
                                    "name": "description",
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "description": "appearance, attire, role, and distinguishing traits"
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
```
